title: HAPPRUN Native 1080P Bluetooth Mini Projector, Full HD Portable Outdoor Movie Projector with Built-in Speaker, Compatible with Smartphone, HDMI, USB, AV, Fire Stick, PS5 for Home, Bedroom, Outdoor Use
bullet_points: [ Native 1080P Full HD Resolution ] - Enjoy crystal-clear visuals with HAPPRUN H1's native 1920x1080 resolution, delivering sharper, brighter, and more vibrant images for an immersive viewing experience. This 1080p projector is perfect for creating a stunning home theater or bedroom projector setup

[ Bluetooth 5.1 Technology ] - Connect your Bluetooth projector to Bluetooth speakers for a richer, more powerful sound experience, or pair with headphones for private, immersive viewing without disturbing others. Perfect for both shared movie nights and personal entertainment, this smart projector is also a great Bluetooth projector for iPhone users

[ Built-in Hi-Fi Stereo Speakers ] - Experience rich, crystal-clear sound with the H1 movie projector's built-in Hi-Fi stereo speakers. Perfect for small bedrooms or cozy movie nights, enjoy powerful audio that brings movies, shows, and games to life. This small projector is ideal for use as a projector for bedroom or outdoor projector

[ Seamless Compatibility with TV Sticks ] - The HAPPRUN TV projector effortlessly integrates with popular TV sticks like Fire TV Stick, Chromecast, and more, offering access to a vast library of streaming content. Enjoy a premium viewing experience that rivals high-end TVs, all at a fraction of the cost (Note: TV sticks are not included)

[ Compatibility Notice ] - This mini projector works with smartphones and tablets, but requires an HDMI adapter (not included). For iOS, use an official Lightning to HDMI adapter. For Android, if your phone supports MHL, use a Micro USB/Type-C to HDMI cable (not included); otherwise, a Chromecast is recommended for wireless mirroring. Enjoy a seamless big-screen experience with this versatile phone projector!

title: Aurzen Roku TV Smart Projector with Wifi and Bluetooth, Roku Streaming Experience Built-in, 1080P FHD, Dolby Audio, Auto Focus & Keystone, Zoom, Movie Portable Outdoor Mini Projector, White
bullet_points: A Roku account and internet connection are required for activation (Creating an account is free)

America's #1 TV Streaming Platform, All Top Apps: With Roku as your entertainment guide, exploring popular apps like Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Hulu, YouTube, Roku Channel, Apple TV—plus free movies, shows, and live TV—is as easy as it is fun. No dongles or extra remotes. Enjoy 500+ TV channels with live news and weather, sports coverage, and more—totally free.

A Simple and Fast Home Screen: Enjoy a simple projector interface with intuitive navigation, quick search, and personalized recommendations. No-nonsense remote keep it effortless, while the Roku mobile app lets you control with your phone, type easily, or use voice commands.

1080P Full HD Resolution: Enjoy your favorite movies and TV shows in stunning high-definition picture quality for enhanced clarity and detail. This projector is perfect for creating a massive 60 to 150-inch screen for your home theater and outdoor movie nights.

3 Levels Brightness for All Your Spaces: Low (LOW POWER) for dim basements, medium (STANDARD) for cozy bedrooms, high (VIVID) for living rooms or outdoor nights (cuts through extra light for sharp visuals).
Auto Focus & Keystone Zero-Fuss: Advanced auto focus and auto keystone correction instantly adjust for a sharp, aligned screen-just place, power on, and enjoy a big screen without manual setup.

Dolby Audio and Dual 5W Speakers: Enjoy deep, resonant audio and precise sound details that make you feel like you're part of the action with Dolby Audio and 3D stereo sound. The built-in Dual 5W speakers deliver crisp, powerful sound that fills the room.
WiFi & Bluetooth 5.2: Connect via Bluetooth 5.2 to headphones or speakers for a private or cinematic experience. Dual-band WiFi (2.4G/5G) ensures smooth, lag-free streaming.

A Perfect Fit for Any Smart Homes: Enjoy easy voice control over your smart projector, which is compatible with Apple HomeKit, Siri, Alexa, and Google Assistant—enabling broader device compatibility and smarter voice control, so your entertainment stays effortless and connected.

Impressive Anniversary, Christmas, Birthday and Gifts for Mom Dad Women and Men: Enjoy an exciting unboxing experience with Aurzen, well-known for the highest quality products. Especially suitable for Anniversary gifts, Christmas gifts, birthday gifts and various gift-giving occasions.

title: TMY 1080P Full HD Portable Mini Projector, Upgraded Bluetooth Movie Projector with Screen, Compatible with TV Stick Smartphone/HDMI/USB, Indoor & Outdoor Use
bullet_points: 【Portable Projector Screen Included】The V08 mini projector includes a projection screen that is tailored to meet our customer's needs. As opposed to other projectors, our included projector screen allows you to set up your own home theater anywhere to watch movies, TV shows, photos, slide shows, and play video games. This portable, foldable, anti-wrinkle and easy to wash projection screen is larger than others, which ensures wider viewing angles and enhanced picture detail.
【Upgraded 1080P HD Video Projector】To better meet your needs, we have upgraded this home projector with our latest LED light source. This small projector features 1080P Full HD supported.

【Two-way Bluetooth Function】With built-in upgraded speaker, you can enjoy a cinematic audio-visual experience without connecting external speakers. Also, this portable projector built-in Bluetooth 5.1 technology to make the audio synchronization faster and more stable. With this Bluetooth projector, you can connect your ideal Bluetooth speakers or headphones wirelessly at any time to get more wonderful sound. Please Note: Bluetooth connection is only for audio transmission with audio devices (Bluetooth speakers or Bluetooth headphones), which cannot be used on smartphone screen mirroring.

【Portable Mobile Home Cinema】The V08 movie projector provides a minimal display area of 32” to a maximum 220” image with projection distances between 1.5-6m. Aspect Ratio: 4:3/16:9, Contrast Ratio: 5000:1, Lamp lifetime: 60,000 hours. It enables excellent playback of movies, TV shows, video games and can be set up conveniently. Our newly improved 2023 uniform illumination method provides the optimal visual experience, ensuring no dark areas are present along the edges of the displayed image.

【Compatibility Instruction】 This mini projector also can be compatible with phones and tablets, if you need to connect the phone or tablet, please prepare a HDMI adapter cable. For ios device, you need to use the official Lightning to HDMI adapter to connect your phone with the projector. (HDMI adapter is not included.) For Android device, if your phone supports MHL, then you can use the micro usb/type-c to HDMI cable to connect your phone with the projector. (HDMI cable is not included.) If your phone does not support MHL, you should prepare a Chrome-cast to connect your phone with the projector.

【Warm Tips】Due to HDCP (High-bandwidth Digital Content Protection) agreement, screen mirroring doesn't work (no image or sound) when you try to mirror the content from some apps (Amazon Prime Video, Hulu, etc.), Please play these videos by inserting your TV Stick/Roku/Chrome-cast into our projector. You can also connect to a laptop/computer to play via HDMI Connection (HDMI Cable Included).

  2. Who is TMY?

    We have been committed to the design, production and sale of projectors since 2015. In 2020, we independently created the brand TMY, focusing on the production and sale of mini home projectors. Our mission is to provide accessible projector solutions, allowing you to create your own home theater to free yourself of fatigue and stress so that you may enjoy life.

title: Mini Projector, Portable Projector 4K & Full HD 1080P Support, 270° Rotation Outdoor Projector, Movie Projector Compatible with Smartphone, TV Stick, Laptop, PS4, HDMI, USB
bullet_points: 🌟 【270° Rotatable Stand & Electric Keystone Correction】 The Q100 mini projector comes with a 270° rotatable stand, allowing you easily project from any angle, even on the ceiling. With electric keystone correction, you can enjoy distortion-free, perfectly aligned images every time, making it the perfect home projector for any setup

🌍 【Up to 200" Giant Screen】 Transform any space into a cinematic experience with the ability of the short throw projector to project up to 200 inches. And 2 aspect ratios are offered: 4:3/16:9. Ideal for both outdoor projector setups or making it a perfect home theater projector

📱 【Easy Wired Connectivity for iOS Devices】 With simple USB connectivity, the Q100 720P projector makes it easy to mirror your Phone’s content to the big screen, letting you share photos, videos, and apps seamlessly ( Note: The mini projector does not come with Bluetooth. Additionally, it has no built-in apps)

🎮 【TV Stick & Box Compatibility for Endless Streaming】 With full compatibility for TV sticks and set-top boxes, the tv projector opens up endless streaming options. Perfect for watching your favorite movies or playing video games on the big screen (An HDMI extender of TV Stick is needed for easy plug-in)

🔌 【Multiple Connectivity Options】 The projector 4k supported offers a variety of ports, including HDMI, USB, and AUX, so the hd projector is also compatible to TV sticks, gaming consoles, laptops, and more, satisfying all your streaming needs

💎 【Short Throw Projection for Space-Saving Setup】 With short throw technology, the projector for bedroom can project a large image even from a short distance, making it perfect for smaller rooms or limited spaces, so that you can enjoy a big-screen experience without needing a large area for setup

🎯 【Electric Focus & ±60° Angle Adjustment】 The projector with stand achieves a perfect viewing experience with electric focus and ±60° angle adjustment, ensuring sharp images and flexible placement. No matter where you place your projector, you can easily adjust it for optimal viewing

🔊 【Built-in High-Quality Speaker】 Enjoy crystal clear, immersive sound from the built-in high-quality speaker of the pocket projector. If you prefer a richer audio experience, easily connect external speakers via the AUX port to boost the sound (Please turn off Dolby sound effects to ensure normal sound playback)

💡 【Durable LED Lamp with 50,000-Hour Lifespan】 The portable projector is equipped with a durable LED lamp offering up to 50,000 hours of use, ensuring long-lasting performance. It’s perfect for long movie marathons, gaming sessions, or daily use

title: 【Officially-Licensed APP & Native 1080P】Thinnest 1.81" Smart Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Auto Focus & Keystone Portable Outdoor Projector, VOPLLS 4K Support Home Movie Projector
bullet_points: 【Compatibe with Netflix, No Extra Devices Needed】This isn’t just a projector—it’s your "Hollywood Digital Pass." Instantly access a global library with pre-installed YouTube/Prime Video, offering 1000,000+ titles at your fingertips. Enjoy officially licensed content, secure and regularly updated, with stunning 4K HDR clarity.

【Sleek and Portable Design】Imagine carrying a slender 1.81inch pocket projector that looks like a premium hardcover book. Its compact, lightweight form factor allows you to slip it into your bag with ease, ready for any projection, movie night, or trip. The minimalist design complements any setting, making it a stylish addition to your workspace or living room.It brings entertainment to life, enhancing every gathering.

【Instant clarity, Precise alignment】The smart projector 4k combines automatic fast focus and 6D all-around keystone correction technology, from power on to enjoyment, auto fcous projector only takes 5 seconds. It abandons tedious manual adjustment, whether it is immersive movies or fierce games, it is ready instantly. The built-in high-sensitivity displacement gyroscope and smart sensor can keenly capture subtle environmental changes, optimize the image in real-time, and present a perfect view.

【Native FHD 1080P Resolution】Projector delivers an extraordinary visual feast with native 1080P resolution. Every frame is vivid, color-accurate, and razor-sharp, supported by 4K playback compatibility—perfect for dark rooms or outdoor nights. Deep blacks and brilliant whites create stunning depth, immersing you in a cinematic experience.

【360° Tool-free Adjustable Bracket】With a 360° rotatable stand, the bedroom projector effortlessly projects images onto the ceiling, offering an unparalleled viewing experience. Whether you prefer sitting or lounging to watch your movies, it satisfies all. Q5 mini projector 4k stand is quick to assemble and disassemble, requiring no tools and providing easy operation. Furthermore, the stand safeguards the projector lens when stored, guarding against dust accumulation and accidental impacts.

【Lightning-Fast WiFi 6 & Bluetooth 5.2 】WiFi 6 ensures stable, rapid signal transmission, empowering the wireless projector with seamless wireless screen mirroring for ultra-smooth movie & gaming sessions. Built-in Bluetooth 5.2 enables the outdoor projector to have seamless audio sync, transforming it into a Bluetooth speaker for on-demand phone music. Immersive viewing awaits! （Please note: Bluetooth function supports audio transmission only, not video.）

【Authentic 320 ANSI Brightness】The VOPLLS Projector delivers certified brightness (compliant with ISO 21118 standards), achieving a true 320 ANSI lumens—equivalent to the 1800 ANSI lumens claimed by other brands. We rigorously test each light beam using a 9-point measurement system, eliminating "light source" trickery and peak mode deception. No exaggerated number—only honest brightness. Experience vivid, precise visuals in bedrooms, living rooms, and beyond.
NOTE: 4K resolution is only supported for playback within the APP. Playback via local USB drives or HDMI input does not support 4K resolution.

(For an even wider app selection, explore our VOPLLS GTV Series projectors.) With regular updates and a secure interface, your personal streaming projector hub is always ready and up-to-date.

【Full Auto-Correction System, Perfectly Aligned from the Start】 Never manually adjust your movie projector again. Our Auto Focus, Auto Keystone, Auto Obstacle Avoidance, and Auto Screen Alignment work in unison in this projector auto focus to deliver a crisp, rectangular image in seconds. Intelligent sensors continuously monitor the environment, ensuring the picture stays sharp and perfectly fitted—whether using it as a wall projector, ceiling projector, or on any uneven surface.

【1800 ANSI HDR10 & 98% NTSC Color for Cinema-Grade 1080P Visuals】 Enjoy stunning visual fidelity with this 4K projector, featuring native 1080P resolution, enhanced by HDR10 and a wide 98% NTSC color gamut. The two-way Bluetooth makes it a versatile bluetooth projector, allowing easy pairing with headphones or speakers. Unlock ultimate convenience with built-in support for AirPlay, Miracast, and DLNA, enabling seamless screen mirroring from your iPhone projector, Android, or laptop for a true wireless projector experience.

【Compact, Portable & Multi-Device Compatible for Outdoor Cinema】 This mini projector boasts a body under 8 inches wide and lightweight design, making it the perfect outdoor projector and camping projector. For the best viewing experience, we recommend using this Proyector in darker environments.

title: [Compatible with Netflix & TOF Real-time Focus] Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, XuanPad Silver Smart Projector 4K Support, Dolby Audio & Keystone, 210° Rotatable Stand for Home
bullet_points: [Compatible with Netflix, Instant Access to Global Entertainment] The smart projector Compatible with Netflix ＆ comes preloaded with multiple streaming apps that unlock a library of over a million movies or shows, with constantly updated content that is secure and stable. Imagine a quiet evening with beam of light pouring gently from projector, instantly transforming the wall into theater screen. Whether it’s a thriller or a rom-com.

[TOF Real-Time Auto-Focus] XuanPad's portable projector utilizes advanced TOF real-time autofocus technology for an instantly clear experience. With TOF instant autofocus, auto keystone correction, obstacle avoidance, and screen-fit alignment, you get crisp, perfectly aligned visuals immediately. Enjoy native 1080p resolution and Dolby-enhanced audio for a truly immersive viewing experience, making it an ideal gift choice.

[Professional-Grade Visual Fidelity] V18 4K projector delivers superior native 1080P resolution with featuring 99% sRGB coverage and HDR optimization, it reveals textures ＆ details others miss. Experience cinema-grade color accuracy. Every frame is vivid, color-accurate, and razor-sharp, perfect for every movie night.

[Immersive Dolby Audio Experience] Step into a new era of home entertainment with bluetooth projector, where every scene is elevated by the iconic Dolby sound. The Hi-Fi stereo speakers deliver an immersive 3D audio experience that makes you feel like you’re right in the middle of the action. From the thunderous applause of a live concert to the subtle whispers in a dramatic scene, Dolby’s precision audio technology brings every detail to life, making every moment legible and compelling.

[Unbelievably compact, unbelievably powerful] This home/outdoor projector delivers true cinematic performance in a body just 4.6×4.72×6.69 inches and a mere 1.76 lbs (about the size of a water bottle). Featuring a 210° rotatable stand and ceiling-mount capability, it adapts to any setup, whether for movie nights in the living room, binge-watching in bed, or outdoor camping adventures, it delivers a seamless big-screen experience anywhere.

title: [Short Throw/1200ANSI/Built in Apps] 4K Outdoor Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Auto Focus Projector with Dual-Mode Stand, Smart Portable Proyector with Netflix/YouTube/PrimeVideo & Dolby
bullet_points: [Built-in Apps, No Need Extra Devices] The iSinbox 4K Smart Outdoor Projector features WiFi and Bluetooth, and a built-in smart TV operating system, giving you instant access to YouTube, Prime Video, and Disney+. Play over 1 million videos with just the touch of a remote. Say goodbye to TV adapters and subscription fees with this 4K projector, which comes with WiFi and Bluetooth, saving you over $300 per year. Enjoy regular updates and lifetime OS upgrades, ensuring your viewing experience remains fresh and secure.

[Dual-Mode Design: Stand and Handle in One] The iSinbox outdoor projector boasts an innovative dual-mode design, combining an integrated 360° stand with an ergonomic handle. Whether you're watching movies at home or taking the 4K projector on the go, this smart design adapts to your lifestyle. This short throw projector rotates from wall to ceiling projection in seconds. It also features universal M4 screw holes for tripod or tabletop placement, allowing for easy adjustment of projection angle without tools. It's perfect for a bedroom, home theater, or outdoor movie night.

[Small Space, Big Picture—1.1:1 Short Throw Ratio] As a true short throw projector, it's designed for compact living—it projects a stunning 100-inch image from just 95inch/7.9ft from the wall. Other standard projectors require distances exceeding 10 feet to project a 100" image. This means you can place it on a compact coffee table or shelf, making it perfect for modern apartments, dorm rooms, and bedrooms where space is at a premium. [Note: The actual throw ratio is 1.1:1, not 1.2:1 as shown on the packaging.]

[Intelligent Auto-Adjustment for Perfect Viewing] No manual adjustments needed! Even when moving the bluetooth projector to a new location, AI autofocus, 6D keystone correction, and automatic obstacle avoidance deliver crisp, clear, and perfectly aligned images in just 3 seconds. Whether ceiling-mounted, sideways, or moved to a new location, this smart projector instantly adapts to any surface while avoiding wall fixtures or furniture. A 50-100% digital zoom lets you adjust the screen size without moving the projector 4K.

[Smart TV OS] The iSinbox Smart Outdoor Projector features an upgraded Smart TV Operating System, powered by a cutting-edge smart chip derived from Silicon Valley technology. This eliminates the cumbersome and laggy nature of traditional operation, improving fluidity and stability by up to 60%. The movie projector supports instant app launch and seamless multitasking, while its millisecond response time and ad-free interface far surpass the competition.

[Stunning Visuals - 1200 ANSI | 4K & HDR10+ Support] This 1200 ANSI lumen projector boasts native 1080p resolution and advanced 4K HDR10+ support, ensuring sharp blacks and preserved details for stunning clarity. Our smart projector uses AI image enhancement for 98% NTSC cinema-grade color accuracy and features eye protection technology that reduces blue light for comfortable viewing, even during extended viewing. This makes it an ideal home 4k projector for watching movies, playing games, or using outdoors at night.

[Pro Dolby Audio & Bluetooth 5.4] The AC311 bluetooth projector features Dolby-certified HiFi stereo speakers and DTS decoding technology, bringing you an immersive cinematic sound experience. Enhanced eARC ensures lossless high-fidelity audio transmission for crystal-clear playback. Combined with the latest two-way Bluetooth 5.4 technology, it provides an ultra-stable wireless connection, allowing you to connect to external speakers or use the outdoor projector as a standalone Bluetooth speaker. With WiFi 6 (up to 9.6 Gbps connection speeds), this tv projector seamlessly connects with all major platforms for seamless screen mirroring, creating the ultimate home entertainment system.

[Reliable Service, Attention to Detail] This mini home theater projector comes with 24-hour response time. Note: The portable projector remote does not include batteries; please bring your own AAA batteries. If the remote is damaged or lost, please contact us for a replacement.

title: [Official Apps & Live TV & 330° Stand]Smart Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth Ultra-thin, 4K Support Outdoor Movie Projector, Auto Focus, HDR10, Portable 1080P Projector for Bedroom/Home/Celling
bullet_points: [Exclusive SmartOS – Endless Streaming in One Place] The S36 portable projector runs on official smart system, giving you access to massive native apps and 1,000+ free live TV channels via Whale TV. It brings together live TV, streaming apps, and connected devices into one clean, easy-to-use interface. Instantly enjoy popular apps like Netlifx, YouTube, Prime Video, Apple TV, Max, ESPN and more.

[More RAM for Smooth, Reliable Streaming] Equipped with 1.5GB DDR RAM, S36 offers more runtime memory than many competing movie projectors. This helps apps load faster, switch more smoothly, and remain responsive during extended viewing. Whether you’re watching cooking shows, music videos, or getting ready for major sports events like the World Cup with DirecTV or hulu, everything runs smoother with less lag.

[Free Live TV & Simple Phone Control] Stream thousands of hours of free live and on-demand TV with no ads and no subscriptions required. You can also download the TV Casting App to control the projector directly from your smartphone, making it easy to browse content, adjust settings, and manage playback from the couch.

[Ultra-Portable Short Throw with 330° Flexible Projection] Weighing just 1.9 lbs and about the size of an i Pad mini, the S36 is perfect for travel, RV trips, or outdoor movie nights. With a 1.19:1 throw ratio, it can project a 100-inch screen from only 8.6 ft, saving space in bedrooms, apartments, or small living rooms. The built-in 330° rotatable stand allows projection onto walls, ceilings, or angled surfaces, and it supports tripod mounting via a standard 1/4" screw for flexible placement almost anywhere.

[Pro Theater System – All-in-One Home Hub] Features native 1080P resolution, supports 4K decoding, and delivers enhanced contrast and color with HDR support. Quick-setting buttons allow you to adjust picture and sound without interrupting playback. CEC support lets one remote control the projector and connected devices for a simple, living-room-friendly experience. (Note: Videos labeled as 4K will display at 1080P, often termed '4K supported' B est viewed in dim or dark environments; not recommended for use in daylight.)

[AI Auto-Setup – Instant Perfect Image] The S36 features an AI Auto-Setup system with auto-focus, auto keystone correction, obstacle avoidance, and screen alignment, plus up to 50% zoom-out. Supports 16:9 and 4:3 aspect ratios in HDMI or USB mode. Place it anywhere—even upside down—and it automatically adjusts the image in seconds for a perfectly aligned picture.A thoughtful gift for birthdays, weddings, housewarmings, or any celebration

[All-in-One Connectivity with Wi-Fi 6 and 2-way Bluetooth] Ensures smooth AirPlay and Miracast from phones and flexible audio options—connect wireless Bluetooth speakers when needed. It can also function as a standalone speaker. HDMI ARC simplifies connection to soundbars or AV receivers.

[Smart Projector OS – Built to Last] Many projectors rely on basic Android systems that are unofficial and unstable. Others use licensed systems that are compliant but with limited app support—often web-based. Even some Google TV projectors offer broader app access but can become less responsive over time due to heavier system requirements. S36 with Smart Whale OS is designed to address these issues, providing smooth performance, wide native app compatibility, and reliable long-term stability.

❤️️[Worry-free Shopping Experience with Reliable After-Sales Service] No need to stress over lamp life, PUTRIMS provides 24/7 after-sales customer support, a 2-YEAR money-back guarantee, 3-YEAR repair coverage, and lifetime technical support to ensure you're fully covered. Please refer to the included quick start guide to access instructional videos and the detailed user manual. Feel free to reach out to us for further assistance—we’re here to help!

Product description

NOTE: Due to HDCP copyright issues, the apps like Netflix/Disney/Hulu prohibits playing movies directly by mirror screen with smartphone. Please connect a TV stick/Roku(Not Include) to watch it.

There is No WiFi and Bluetooth connection function, if you need to connect phone, please prepare a HDMI adapter cable. Due to HDCP agreement, screen mirroring doesn't work when you try to mirror the videos from apps (Prime Video, Netflix etc). You can connect a TV stick/Roku to display those apps.

Previous page
Next page
Previous page
Next page

  • Can't mirror my phone screen to the projector?

    Please check that the connection cable is a data transmission cable and that your phone supports wired mirroring.

  • How to watch video from Amazon Prime Video, Netflix, Hulu, etc?

    Please play these videos by inserting your TV Stick/Roku into our projector. You can also connect to a laptop/computer to play via HDMI Connection (HDMI Cable Included).

  • How to connect with ios phones?

    Connecting an iOS device to the projector requires Apple's official Lightning to HDMI Adapter. (HDMI adapter is not included.)

  • How to connect with Android phones?

    Connecting Android devices to the projector requires an MHL-compatible micro USB/Type-C to HDMI cable. (HDMI adapter is not included.)

  • Product Damaged/Don't Work/Not Satified?

    Please make sure power cable has been connected very well, and do not charge TV stick via USB port on projector when using TV stick at the same time, because it will casue projector damaged.

title: ViewSonic M1X Portable LED Projector with Smart Stand, Harman Kardon Speakers, Built-In Battery, H/V Keystone, 4 Corner Adjustment, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, USB-C, Powered USB A
bullet_points: Smart LED Portable Projector: WVGA (854x480p) resolution with a 1.2 throw ratio, 3-in-1 smart stand, and built-in battery
Vibrant Colors: SuperColor technology delivers a wide color gamut and stunningly beautiful images.
Wireless Connectivity & Premium Sound: Stream content via Wi-Fi and enjoy rich audio with built-in Harman Kardon Bluetooth speakers
Built-In Smart Streaming: Access your favorite content with the integrated Aptoide app store, offering seamless streaming and smart features right out of the box.
Large Screen Projection: Projects screen sizes from 60" to 100" with a throw distance of 5.2 ft - 8.7 ft; displays a 80" image from 6.9 ft
Easy Setup & Image Adjustment: H/V keystone, 360-degree projection, 4-corner adjustment, and auto keystone
description_text: Take exhilarating entertainment on-the-go with the M1X portable LED projector. With a weight of less than 2 lbs., this modern portable projector features a patented 3-in-1 smart stand that delivers 360° projection angles and automatically turns on the projector when swiveled. This smart stand also acts as a lens cover that protects the projector when traveling or not in use. From the living room to the great outdoors, the M1X projector immerses users in a stunning multimedia viewing experience with images up to 100” and crisp Harman Kardon speakers. Enjoy an effortless setup experience with features like H/V keystoning and automated four-corner adjustment. Binge shows and movies for longer with a built-in battery that lasts up to four hours, or plug in a power bank for all-day entertainment. Whether you use Chromecast, Roku or Apple TV, the M1X lets you connect your favorite streaming devices directly into the USB-A port. Or take advantage of the M1X’s versatile connectivity options and connect your mobile device via Bluetooth, WiFi, HDMI or USB-C.

Entertainment On the Go

bullet_points: [Smart Projector with Officially-Licensed APP– Stream Anywhere] - This projector compatible with Netflix comes with built-in streaming apps for the ultimate convenience. Whether you’re enjoying a cozy night in bed or camping under the stars, just a tap lets you stream thousands of movies and shows from Netflix, Prime Video, YouTube, and more. With smooth performance, vivid visuals, and reliable stability, this video projector brings the big-screen experience to any place, anytime.

[Immersive Dolby Audio – Where Every Scene Sounds Cinematic] - This outdoor projector with wifi and bluetooth Powered by Dolby Audio, every whisper, beat, and explosion comes alive with stunning clarity and depth—turning your bedroom, living room, or backyard into a personal theater. This small projector for bedroom coupled with ultra-fast WiFi 6 and Bluetooth 5.2, enjoy smooth streaming and seamless device pairing with sound that truly surrounds you.

[AI-Powered Ultra-Fast TOF Autofocus] - Powered by advanced TOF laser technology, our smart projector achieves razor-sharp focus in just 0.3 seconds - eliminating the frustrating 10-second wait common with traditional models. With fully automatic keystone correction that instantly adapts to any placement angle, you're guaranteed a perfectly rectangular image without manual adjustments. Your ideal movie night is now truly hassle-free.

[Lightweight Linux System] - Instant-On Simplicity: Say goodbye to loading screens. A single press instantly launches your content. Zero Bloatware, Zero Ads: Forget the cluttered, ad-ridden interfaces of Android movie projectors. Enjoy a clean, distraction-free viewing environment. Engineered to Never Slow: Our efficient Linux architecture is specifically designed to eliminate lag and maintain day-one speed, delivering lasting performance that Android can't match.

[Luxury Meets Portability] - Bid farewell to bulky projectors. Featuring a compact body, dimensional design, and refined texture, this mini portable projector transforms into a tasteful accent where technology meets art in your living room.  At just 880g—light as a magazine—the mini projector slips effortlessly into any bag. Perfect for travel or a summer movie night under the stars. 210° free-angle projection provides a distortion-free view from any angle, be it in a tent, a campervan, or on your ceiling. Your personal theater is now truly everywhere.

[Stunning 4K Clarity – See Every Detail Come to Life] - Immerse yourself in breathtaking visuals with native 1080P resolution and 4K decoding support—delivering ultra-sharp detail, vivid colors, and lifelike contrast. With true 350 ANSI lumens—equivalent to the 2000 ANSI lumens claimed by other brands, every movie night, gaming session, or presentation is elevated to a cinematic level, whether indoors or out.

bullet_points: Exciting Moments Begin - The XuanPad mini projector compatible with Netflix for the ultimate viewing experience.No extra devices or complicated setup needed—just enjoy instant access to a vast library of movies with immersive, smart TV-like quality.XuanPad smart projectors are compatible with a variety of built-in apps like YouTube and Prime Video, and support for wireless screen mirroring and HDMI. Whether it's movie night, a gaming session, or camping, our licensed projectors can meet your customized entertainment needs.

4K Home Theater Master Pro- This XuanPad Ultra-thin small projector offers native 1080 and 4K resolutions, is equipped with a three-piece double-sided nano-high-lens lens and a high-precision LCD display, and uses color gamut reconstruction technology to replicate the billions of color spectra in nature. With 1800 ANSI (ISO 21118 certified), Projected image sizes range from 40’’ to 200’’, with an intelligent light sensing system, you can enjoy clear and sharp images day or night,and won't feel tired. The XuanPad 4K projector delivers stunning visuals and immersive audio for a home theater-quality entertainment experience.

Go Along With Pocket Projector - The XuanPad portable projector weighs only 1.89 lbs and is as compact as a IPAD MINI (approximately 2.69 inches) and easily fits into a handbag. It is the best outdoor projector for movie nights and long-distance travel. The built-in 360-degree rotatable and detachable stand disassembles in seconds for easy storage. Multiple mounting options offer freedom from constraints, and 360° adjustment lets you create your own personal theater or gaming center, whether on a wall, ceiling, or outdoor projector screen. Enjoy an immersive big-screen experience anytime, anywhere.

One Touch Is Right,Own your View - The smart projector with AI autofocus, 3 seconds to capture the best focus, clear picture without waiting, free placement without entanglement. Projector with 6D one-touch auto keystone correction, skewed images are instantly adjusted, turning any wall into a flawless big screen. You can also zoom in and out with a single click, from half to full screen at your fingertips. Whether you're projecting from an angle, on an uneven surface, or in a confined space, setup is easy and simple. Say goodbye to tedious adjustments and get the perfect fit for your smart lifestyle.

Teleportation Without Boundary - Equipped with 5.2 high-speed Bluetooth, the XuanPad projector with bluetooth and wifi delivers zero-lag, high-fidelity audio sync. Furthermore, XuanPad wifi projector utilizes the latest dual-band 5G/2.4G WiFi technology. Whether you're mirroring your phone or tablet to play a slideshow, catch a live stream, or engage in a game, you'll enjoy uninterrupted, lag-free viewing and incredibly smooth operation.

7/24 Customer Service - As a professional supplier in the projector industry, XuanPad always puts customer service at our top priority. If you encounter any problems or questions when using our products, please feel free to contact us directly through Amazon. We provide quick response within 24 hours, two-year product replacement warranty, and lifetime after-sales service.

title: Mini Projector, VISSPL Full HD 1080P Video Projector, Portable Outdoor Projector with Tripod, Kids Gift, Home Theater Movie Phone Projector Compatible with Android/iOS/Windows/TV Stick/HDMI/USB
bullet_points: 【Smallest & On-the-Go Entertainment】Measuring a mere 6.1*5.08*2.4“, equivalent to the size of two Coke cans, mini projector can easily fit in your pocket or bag. Weighing only 1.1 lb, even child's tiny fingers can effortlessly grasp the smallest projector. Its sophisticated design and exquisite handheld packaging makes it a perfect gift choice for all ages. Just enjoy the freedom of taking this lightweight and handy projector with you wherever you go.

【Full HD 1080P & Eye Protection】The VISSPL 2025 projector supports 1080P resolution for stunning visuals. Powered by advanced LED technology and a uniform illumination method, our projector guarantees exceptional image quality, delivering a dynamic and color-vibrant effect, minimizing the impact of blue and direct light. Perfect for safeguarding children's eye health! For optimal performance, we recommend using video projector in a dark environment to fully enjoy its capabilities.

【Mini Tripod & Powerful Sound】VISSPL movie projector supports a screen size of 35-160’’, perfect for creating a cinematic atmosphere. ±15°Keystone correction and included projector tripod offers the freedom to position your projector at the ideal height, eliminating the need to adjust to screen or table limitations. With its built-in HiFi speaker to enjoy powerful and dynamic audio that enhances your entertainment experience whether it's at home, or during kids' parties.

【Multiple-device Connection】VISSPL outdoor projector provides multiple input source interfaces, catering to a wide range of equipment requirements. With HDMI, USB, AV, and Audio ports, it seamlessly connects to devices such as smartphones, laptops, TV stick, PS5, and external speakers. ***Due to HDCP copyright issues, Netflix / Disney / Hulu prohibits playing movies directly from the projector, please use a TV Stick to play.***When connecting with phone, an extra HDMI adapter is needed.

【Long Lamp Life & Technical Support】With high-efficiency cooling technology, it reduces fan noise by 50% compared to other projectors, extending lamp life to over 55000 hours. If you have any problems while using, please let us know at once. VISSPL projector team offers Lifetime Technical Support for all our products.

  • Can I play Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu, etc?

    Due to HDCP copyright issues, the apps like Netflix / Disney / Hulu prohibits playing movies directly by mirror screen with smartphone. Please use a TV stick to connect to watch it.

  • Can I use it for business presentation?

    Not recommended for business presentation, it is a home theater projector. We recommend using video projector in a dark environment to fully enjoy its capabilities.

  • What is the optimal viewing distance and projection size of this mini projector?

    The best viewing distance is 6.56ft (2m) and the size is about 70 inches.

  • Is the projector compatible with smartphones?

    Yes, when connecting with phone, an extra HDMI adapter is needed. (HDMI adapter not included) It is not compatible with Google phones. Due to mirroring protocol, Google phones do not support screen mirroring

title: Epson EpiqVision Flex CO-FH02 Full HD 1080p Smart Streaming Portable Projector, 3-Chip 3LCD, 3,000 Lumen Color/White Brightness, Android TV, Bluetooth, 5W Speaker, Home Entertainment (Renewed)
bullet_points: Display Stunning Images up to 300" — Full HD 1080p picture four times larger than a 75" flat panel delivers an immersive experience for business presentations, home viewing and beyond
Compact Design — Sleek, lightweight design easily fits in backpacks for easy portability on the go
Ultra Bright Images — 3,000 lumens of color and white brightness (1) deliver outstanding-quality images in a variety of lighting conditions

Best-in-Class Color Brightness (2) — Advanced 3-chip 3LCD technology displays 100% of the RGB color signal for every frame, allowing for outstanding color accuracy while maintaining excellent color brightness without any distracting “rainbowing” or “color brightness” issues seen with other projection technologies

Smart Streaming Capability — Android TV (3) interface with a simple-to-use remote—including voice search with built-in Google Assistant; watch all your favorite streaming channels including Netflix, Apple TV+, Amazon Prime, Hulu, Disney+, HBO Max, YouTube and more; even stream live TV with apps like YouTube TV (4)
High-Quality Speaker — Built-in bass reflex speaker perfect for business presentations and watching movies

Versatile for Virtual Meetings and Learning — Enhance meetings and learning at home with detailed, life-sized images perfect for Zoom calls and Microsoft Teams video conferencing; enjoy virtual hangouts with friends and family like they are in the room with you
Chromecast Included (5) — Wirelessly cast your favorite content directly from your smartphone, tablet or computer, including from popular Android and Apple devices (6)
Advanced Scene Adaptive Color Correction — Automatic scene-based color correction produces a clear and natural picture—regardless of the content being played
All-Digital HDMI Connectivity — Easily connect your laptop, cable/satellite box, Blu-ray Disc player, gaming console or streaming devices, such as Roku, Amazon Fire TV, Apple TV and Google TV (4)
description_text: Enjoy versatile projection for remote work, home entertainment and beyond with the Epson EpiqVision Flex CO-FH02 Smart Streaming Portable Projector. Designed to bring more ease and convenience to your workday, the Epson EpiqVision Flex CO-FH02 delivers a Full HD 1080p picture up to 300"—that’s four times larger than a 75" flat panel—for collaborative online meetings and detailed presentations. Perfect for engaging at-home learning, immersive movie watching and more, this 3,000-lumen projector (1) offers Best-in-Class Color Brightness (2) to deliver crisp, colorful images in virtually any lighting environment—even during the daytime. Sleek and compact, this portable projector can be easily carried in bags and backpacks for easy viewing virtually anywhere. It features a powerful, high-quality speaker system for a truly amazing viewing experience. And, with Android TV (3) included, you can tune into all your favorite streaming channels, including Netflix, Apple TV+, Amazon Prime Video, Hulu, Disney+, Max, YouTube and more (4).1. Color brightness (color light output) and white brightness (white light output) will vary depending on usage conditions. Color light output measured in accordance with IDMS 15.4; white light output measured in accordance with ISO 21118. | 2. Color brightness measured per IDMS 15.4. Additional colors and picture modes tested. Top-selling Epson 3LCD projectors vs. comparable top-selling 1-chip DLP projectors based on NPD sales data for October 2019 – September 2020. COLOR BRIGHTNESS WILL VARY BASED ON USAGE CONDITIONS. | 3. In order to use the Android TV, the device must be configured on a network via a wireless connection of 5 Mbps or faster. | 4. Requires wireless network connection of 5 Mbps or faster. Some apps require paid subscriptions. | 5. Visit the Google Chromecast website for the latest smart device and computer OS support. | 6. May require additional software.

title: TCL C1 Smart Projector 4K Support, Google TV & Netflix Officially Licensed, WIFI and Bluetooth, Auto Focus Keystone, Native 1080p, Dolby Audio, 285° Portable Mini Projector for Home Theater
bullet_points: 【Smart Google TV Projector】 - Google and TCL collaborate on this projector system. Make sure you can enjoy immediate access to certified Netflix, Prime Video, YouTube, Hulu, HBO, and many other major streaming services directly on the Officially Coorprated Google TV system. No more TV sticks, Firestick, Roku or complicated setups, just turn it on and watch. Plus, easily download over 10,000 additional apps from the official Google Play Store — your favorite entertainment is always at your fingertips. And control your projector with voice commands via Google Assistant, creating a smart home experience.

【Dolby Audio Home Theater Projector with 8W Speaker】 – The TCL C1 projector delivers an immersive sound experience powered by Dolby Audio and a powerful 8W speaker. Even the faintest whispers and most powerful explosions gain remarkable depth, transforming your room into a concert hall. With noise levels below 30 dB, you won't be disturbed by fan noise even during the quietest scenes.

【4K Video, Native 1080P, HDR10, 230 ISO Lumens for Perfect Images】 - TCL's ImmersiColor technology reproduces details with impeccable color accuracy, optimized for professional-grade image quality. Thanks to Native 1080P resulation, HDR10 tech and 4K video compatibility, enjoy ultra-defined content. With 4 professional visual modes, viewing is always ideal, from day to night. TCL C1 movie projector is designed with 230 ISO Lumens equivalent to the 2000 ANSI lumens claimed by other brands. (ISO Lumens cannot be falsified, unlike ANSI Lumens)

【Smart Portable Mini Projector With Intelligent Screen Adjustment】 - TCL C1 design with 285° Rotatable Handle Stand, Autofocus, Auto Keystone Correction, Automatic Obstacle Avoidance and Auto Screen Size Adjustment. TCL's intelligent algorithm can automatically adjusts screen within seconds. The 285° rotatable stand enables projection at angles from 40° to 120°. Its compact design and integrated handle make it perfectly portable. Whether in a bedroom, living room for movie night, garden with friends, or on the go, the TCL C1 instantly adapts to any space. Engineered for mobility, ready for adventure and easy to set up.

【Ultra-Stable Connectivity: 5G Wi-Fi & Bidirectional Bluetooth 5.1】 - Thanks to TCL's experience in the TV sector, the C1 delivers an ultra-stable connection. 5G Wi-Fi ensures smooth streaming of movies and games, without lag or buffering. Bidirectional Bluetooth 5.1 is unique: you can not only connect your headphones but also use the projector as a Bluetooth speaker for your smartphone — a feature most projectors don't offer.

【Robust Design & Zero Maintenance】 - The fully sealed optical engine protects internal components from dust and humidity, ensuring lasting performance and image quality over time. With a lamp life of 30,000 hours, the C1 is a long-term investment. Maintenance? Almost nonexistent: a simple lens cleaning is all it takes.

【Universal Installation & Total Compatibility】 - The TCL C1 projector base integrates a standard 1/4-inch mount for tripod, ceiling, or wall installation, making it ideal for home cinema, gaming, office, and studio use. Equipped with HDMI 2.1, USB 2.0, and 3.5mm audio input ports, it is compatible with laptops, DVD players, gaming consoles (Switch/PS5/Xbox), external speakers, and more. Bring the cinema anywhere: bedroom, living room, gym, garden, camper, or tent.
【Technical Specifications】 - Projection Distance: 1.15 m to 3.3 m (40" to 120" screen). Dimensions: 13.7 x 14.5 x 23.1 cm (L x H x D). Weight: Only 1.77 kg.

【Worry-Free Warranty & Customer Support】 - We offer free return/exchange within 1 month, warranties of up to 24 months, and dedicated customer support. For full details, consult the User Guide (PDF) on this page or contact our customer service. Shop with complete peace of mind.

title: Wireless Mini Projector with WIFI 6 and Bluetooth, 4K 1080P Support Portable Projector 180° Rotatable. 17"-130" Screen Video Projector. Compatible for Smartphone, Laptop, PC(Q5 mate)
bullet_points: 【WiFi6 & Bluetooth & Speaker Function】Portable projector with built-in WiFi6 & 5G & speaker. Faster transfer rates and lower transmission latency make it easy and fast to connect to smartphones, laptops, and more. Achieve fast and stable projection of videos, games, and more.

【180° Swivel Mini Projector】The projector base is equipped with a 180° swivel bracket, which allows the projector to point in various directions, including from the wall to the ceiling. Immerse yourself in a wide screen of 35-130 inches for a truly immersive viewing experience.

【1080P HD Video Projection】Support 1080P/4K resolution, bring good visual effects. With advanced LED technology, the projection image is bright and lifelike. Compatible with both WiFi6 and 5G networks. With a 1500:1 contrast ratio, this projector delivers stunning visuals that ensure crisp details and vibrant colors.

【Long Lamp Life】Thanks to advanced fan cooling technology, this portable projector is quieter and more durable than previous models. The powerful cooling system effectively cools the heat of the bulb, extending the lamp life to 45,000 hours.

【Widely compatible projector】Portable projector built-in DC, AV, USB, 3.5mm headphone port, suitable for TV sticks/boxes, game consoles, laptops, PCs, smartphones, tablets, USB flash drives, etc. You can use it for home theater, parties, work, etc.

【Warm Tips】Due to HDCP (High-bandwidth Digital Content Protection) agreement, screen mirroring doesn't work (no image or sound) when you try to mirror the content from some apps ( Hulu, etc.), Please play these videos by inserting your TV Stick/Roku/Chrome-cast into our projector. You can also connect to a laptop/computer to play via HDMI Connection.（Included）

title: CLOKOWE Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Built-in Apps, Smart Portable Projector with 180° Rotation, Auto Keystone, Support 1080P, Compatible with HDMI/USB/TV Stick/Smartphone/Laptop
bullet_points: Built-in Streaming Apps & Versatile Connectivity: Stream YouTube, Prime Video, and more with built-in apps—just connect to Wi-Fi and enjoy, no extra devices needed. This projector supports both wireless mirroring and wired connections for phones, tablets, and laptops. HDMI and USB ports let you easily connect game consoles, Fire Stick, or computers—perfect for home entertainment, family sharing, or on-the-go projection

180° Ceiling Projection – No Mount Needed: The projector body rotates 180° for flexible viewing angles—project onto ceilings, walls, or screens without needing a tripod. Auto keystone correction ensures aligned visuals, and manual focus delivers clarity. Perfect for cozy bedrooms, kids’ story time, dorms, or any small space where flexibility is key

Smooth Wireless Streaming with Wi-Fi 6 & Bluetooth 5.2: This mini projector supports fast, stable screen mirroring from iPhone, Android, tablet, and laptop via advanced Wi-Fi 6. Bluetooth 5.2 enables instant pairing with speakers for synchronized audio. No more messy cables—enjoy wireless freedom and immersive home theater experiences anywhere

Ultra-Portable Mini Projector – As Small as a Soda Can: Measuring just 3.73 × 3.73 × 6.17 inches and weighing only 0.77 lb, this portable mini projector slips easily into a backpack or handbag. Whether for travel, dorm rooms, or compact living spaces, it lets you enjoy big-screen entertainment anywhere—without the bulk or hassle of traditional projectors. Includes 2-years factory support and reliable customer support to ensure peace of mind (Tip: Power adapter connection required for use.)

2025 Upgraded Movie Projector: This video projector offers a brightness of 8000 Lux and supports 1080P display. With advanced LED technology and uniform illumination, it enhances clarity and brightness, ensuring consistent image quality. Featuring a 0.9:1 short throw ratio, it supports screen sizes from 30 to 200 inches (ideal for 40–100 inches), offering vivid, dynamic visuals—ideal for indoor bedrooms and outdoor movie screenings

Personalized Projector with Custom Wallpapers: This small projector lets you personalize your viewing experience by uploading your own background images from a USB drive. You can also set a timer for automatic shut-off, allowing for more controlled use—ideal for kids' bedtime stories or video watching. Additionally, the projector is compatible with a TV stick (not included), allowing access to a wide range of streaming apps

Product description

Previous page

Previous page
Next page

  • How to connect your phone to the projector?

    Wireless: Connect phone & projector to same WiFi→Open "ScreenCast" on projector→Enable screen mirroring on phone.

    Wired: Use HDMI adapter(Not included)→Select HDMI input on projector→Enable screen mirroring on phone.

  • Can the projector stream YouTube or Amazon Prime Video via screen mirroring?

    Due to HDCP copyright protection, screen mirroring (e.g., Miracast/AirPlay) may fail to display video (black screen/audio-only).

    For the best experience, we recommend using a Fire Stick, Roku, or connecting a laptop or computer to play.

  • How to use the remote?

    Aim at the projected image within 30° and 20 ft (6 m). If the remote isn’t working or is damaged, please reach out to our support team for assistance. You can also control the projector using a USB mouse (not included).

  • Why can't the projector connect to WiFi?

    Keep the projector within 5m (16ft) of the router and check if the WiFi is overloaded.Test connectivity using a phone hotspot to rule out network issues. If needed, try to reset the projector.

  • Built-in app won’t play videos?

    1.Restore Factory Settings.

    2.Go to Settings > Date & Time and make sure the Time Zone matches your location.

    3.Check that the projector is connected to a working Wi-Fi network.

    4.Reopen the app.

bullet_points: FROM SMARTPHONE TO THE BIG SCREEN | Pocket Projector Produces Bright, Vivid Video & Imaging Up to 150” for Amazing Home Entertainment; Watch Movies Plugging in an External Device, View Pictures or Give Presentations Anywhere a Wall is Available!

MULTIPLE METHODS FOR VIEWING | Versatile Device Comes w/ HDMI & Micro USB Cables for Hookup to Camera, Storage Drive, PC, Laptop & Other Compatible Devices | Go Wireless w/ Mobile-to-Projector Mirroring Via Airplay & Miracast

STUNNING 16:9 PROJECTION | Device Boasts 60 Ansi lumen brightness LED Lamp, 854 x 480 Resolution, Supports 4K Resolution & 1000:1 Contrast Ratio for Crystal Clear Widescreen Imaging; Watch HD Video, Play 4K Games & Share Family Photographs w/ Brilliant Color & Clarity
DESIGNED FOR EASY PORTABILITY | Includes Built-In Speaker & Sleek Illuminated Onboard Controls So You Can Watch & Listen On Demand| Powers Via Rechargeable Battery Up to 2.5 Hrs.

THE ULTIMATE MULTIMEDIA COMPANION | Tiny Projector Makes a Wonderful Gift Idea Note: Copyrighted content from Hulu, Netflix, and similar services CAN NOT be mirrored or screencast. description_text: Meet the ultimate in multimedia magic. Thanks to the smartphone, you always have incredible imaging at your fingertips. But what happens when you want to share with friends and family? The innovators at KODAK help you look at the big picture with the Luma 150 Portable Projector. This revolutionary device delivers audiovisual excellence with its super bright LED lamp, 16.7 million display colors. Whether you’re watching home movies, the latest blockbuster film, funny YouTube videos or your favorite streaming service, the built-in speaker offers powerful portability. Use the microSD card slot, USB cable, HDMI cable or integrated Airplay and Miracast screen casting (for downloaded content) to connect to a variety of external devices. From the family room to the backyard to the boardroom, it’s a full-size theater that fits in your pocket! So say goodbye to the cramped ‘gather round,’ and wow a crowd by adding the KODAK Luma 150 to your cart today! What You Get 1 x Luma 150 Portable Projector 1 x Full-size HDMI cable 1 x USB to Micro-USB cable Quickstart guide Specs & Details Technology: DLP 0.3” EM DMD Brightness: 60 Ansi lumen Resolution: 854 x 480 [1080p] LED life: 3000 hours Contrast ratio: 1000:1 Display colors: 16.7 million Offset: 100% Throw ratio: 1:2 Aspect ratio: 16:9 Focus: manual Screen size: 150” OS: Linux Speaker: 1.5 W Battery life: 2.5 hours Dimensions: 3.9 x 3.9 x 0.89” Weight: 7.75oz

aplus_html:
From the manufacturer

GIVE YOUR PRESENTATIONS A PROMOTION

Previous page

  1. Every Meeting’s Must-Have

    Keep this projector handy for all your meetings; it fits neatly into briefcases or messenger bags.

  2. Own the Room

    Don’t miss a single detail! Everything looks clearer on a 16:9 screen that expands up to 150″.

Next page

  • What makes the KODAK LUMA 150 unique?

    The KODAK LUMA 150 is ideal for all your meetings and/or presentations, with DLP technology, simple touch controls, and near-universal device compatibility. View slides, photos, or videos on a screen up to 150″, with a play time of up to 2.5 hours.

  • Does it work with USB drives?

    It sure does! Just plug in your USB drive to the USB port, and the KODAK LUMA 150 will locate any viewable files, like photos or videos, for you to view.

  • Will it play all videos in 1080p?

    That depends on your connection and the quality of the video. Native 1080p videos will play in full HD over a good connection (from your device to the video source, and your device to the projector), but 720p/lower-quality videos will not upscale.

  • Will it work with a tripod?

    Yes, absolutely. The KODAK LUMA 150 features threading for a standard tripod mount on the bottom, so you can easily mount your projector for steady viewing.

  • What types of inputs are supported?

    The KODAK LUMA 150 can play files from microSD cards, USB, or HDMI connection ports. Other video inputs (DVI, Display, etc.) will need an adapter (not included). Connect compatible devices wirelessly via Airplay or Miracast and mirror your screen.

title: 【Official Licensed Google TV】4K Smart Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, VOPLLS Outdoor Projectors with Dolby/Auto Focus, Portable Movie Phone Wireless Gaming Wifi Proyector for Bedroom/Home/Celling
bullet_points: 【Google TV Entertainment Hub: Your All-in-One Streaming Center】 Enjoy instant access to vast streaming content with zero setup—the ideal partner for portable projection. The VOPLLS G3 smart system, powered by Google's latest chip and rigorously certified, ensures smooth performance and lifelong updates for a cutting-edge home theater. Move beyond basic 'compatible with Netflix' projectors. Our device is fully compatible with top platforms including Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video, and Hulu, with no extra devices required. The built-in Google Play Store provides 10,000+ apps and 800+ free live channels, instantly turning any space into your premium outdoor cinema.

【Smart Entertainment Ecosystem: AI-Powered Personalization & Family Safety】 Powered by Google TV AI, the home screen smartly organizes movies, shows, and live content based on your viewing habits, pushing tailored recommendations to your 4k proyector. Easily create personalized profiles with separate watch history and recommendations – perfect for bedroom projectors and camping use during family trips. Essential for kids' rooms: Kid-Safe Mode enables content rating filters, viewing time limits, and bedtime lock screen activation.

【Hands-Free Voice Command Home Theater - Just Speak & Watch】 Simply press the mic button on your home theater projector remote and speak naturally. Command like a pro: “Play Stranger Things on Netflix,” “Lower volume,” or “What’s the weather?” – the built-in Google Assistant understands perfectly.Go beyond play/pause: Search movies across apps, launch Netflix, control smart features – all hands-free. Perfect for bedroom viewing, outdoor movie nights, and camping trips!

【360°Portable Outdoor 4K Projector: Cinema-Quality Flexibility】Experience movie theater-quality visuals with stunning HDR10 clarity—deep blacks retain texture, bright scenes maintain vibrance. Supports 4K input (displays native 1080p) – ideal for backyard movie nights. Our 98% wide color coverage delivers Hollywood-grade color. The sleek portable body rotates 360° to project on ceilings or angled patio screenings, perfect for camping trips and outdoor portable movies.

【Gaming & Indoor Pro Picture: Self-Adjusting Perfection】 No more manual adjustments! Point this room projector anywhere for instant magic: Auto Focus: Crisp images in seconds (even after bumps). Auto Keystone: Corrects tilted frames. Smart Avoidance: Dodges wall outlets/photo frames. Screen Fit: Snaps perfectly to screens. Digital Zoom: 50%-100% size flexibility. Connect PS5/Switch via HDMI port for lag-free gaming. Install anywhere: desktop, wall-mount, tripod, ceiling mount. Move mid-movie? Self-realignment before popcorn refill.

【Dolby Atmos & Wireless Sound Pro: 5.2 Bi-Direct Audio】 Bluetooth 5.2 bidirectional ensures lossless audio/video sync in this wireless projetor. Movie mode: Dolby Atmos via dual speakers — thunder rumbles from floor to ceiling, dialogue crystal-clear for home theater immersion. Party mode? Instantly switch to Bluetooth speaker (no screen needed!) for playlists. Late nights: Pair zero-lag wireless headphones (iPhone/Android compatible) – eliminate noise complaints in apartments.

【Whisper-Quiet 30db Cooling & Full Connectivity】 Smart dual-fan cooling with temp sensors(competitors ≥35dB) – barely hear it!. Stream 4K via WiFi 6 (buffering? Gone!). Supports AirPlay, Miracast, Chromecast protocols – cast from iPhone/Android/PC/Mac in one tap. Plug in game consoles (PS5/Switch), laptops, USB drives, or speakers through HDMI/USB/audio ports.The advanced LED light source lasts up to 100,000 hours.Enjoy 24/7 support, a 3-year protection, and lifetime customer support.

From the manufacturer

CARRY A WORLD OF ENTERTAINMENT IN YOUR POCKET

Previous page

  1. Big Entertainment, Small Package

    Measuring just 3″ x 3″ x 0.8″, this projector fits easily into pockets or backpacks.

Next page

  • What makes the KODAK LUMA 75 unique?

    The KODAK LUMA 75 uses DLP technology, one-touch controls, and near-universal device compatibility. It plays HD videos on a screen up to 100″, and sports a play time of up to 2 hours. Get these features and more at a price that flatters your budget.

  • Does it work with USB drives?

    It sure does! Just plug in your USB drive to the USB port, and the KODAK LUMA 75 will locate any viewable files, like photos or videos, for you to view.

  • Will it play all videos in 1080p?

    That depends on your connection and the quality of the video. Native 1080p videos will play in full HD over a good connection (from your device to the video source, and your device to the projector), but 720p/lower-quality videos will not upscale.

  • Will it work with a tripod?

    Yes, absolutely. The KODAK LUMA 75 features threading for a standard tripod mount on the bottom, so you can easily mount your projector for steady viewing.

  • What types of inputs are supported?

    The KODAK LUMA 75 can play files from microSD cards as well as via USB or HDMI connection ports. If your device uses a different type of video input (DVI, Display, etc.) you will need to purchase an adapter (not included).

bullet_points: 【Upgraded Model - Stronger Performance】HY300 ULTRA smart projector, as an upgraded model of HY300PRO, is equipped with advanced Android TV 11.0 system, continuing the advantages of Mali-G31 GPU and WiFi 6 technology, new motorised focus function, 160 ANSI lumens high brightness upgrade, Bluetooth 5.4, and built-in application ecosystem continues to expand, enjoying Prime Video/YouTube and other platforms over 500,000 film and television resources. The built-in application ecosystem continues to expand, enjoying more than 500,000 film and TV resources on Netflix/Prime

【Multi-dimensional Space Projection - Scene Breakthrough】HY300 ULTRA inherits the 210° free rotation gene, and the new generation of swivel bracket is more solid to realise multi-dimensional projection on the wall/ceiling/floor. Seamless switching between home theatre, business meeting and online classroom teaching scenarios, and the upgraded short-focus lens enables 2m to project a 100-inch giant screen, increasing the space utilisation rate by 30%.

【Dual Intelligent Correction + HiFi Sound Quality】Upgraded 5W Soundbase speakers, six-way auto keystone correction, TOF laser focus, 0.8 seconds flat screen. Built-in DSP audio processor, 360° surround sound field is 25% larger than the previous generation, new night cinema mode intelligently adjusts the sound pressure, perfect for late-night viewing.

【Cinema-level picture quality engine】using the new RGB + B four-channel LED light source, 160ANSI lumens brightness than the previous generation to enhance 50%, with HDR10 + dynamic decoding technology. 1080P physical resolution compatible with the 4K input, 2000:1 contrast ratio presents a deeper dark field details, MEMC motion compensation to effectively eliminate high-speed screen drag.

【Super Cooling System】Innovative turbo dual air duct design, operating noise down to 22dB(A) 12% lower than its predecessor, lower continuous operating temperature. Retain HDMI2.1/USB3.0/Bluetooth 5.4 multi-interface configuration, new NAS LAN direct connection function, support simultaneous connection of devices to cast screen

  2. ERAN

    ERAN was born in 2006 and has been a pioneer in light-driven art. From living rooms to amphitheaters, our obsession with pixel-perfect clarity and adaptive innovation has redefined the way the world experiences visual storytelling.

    Every ERAN product embodies our commitment to transforming ordinary spaces into cinematic wonderlands. Every shot is calibrated for human wonder, and every frame is a testament to our relentless pursuit of vision.

    ERAN exists to redefine excellence: crafting projectors as gateways to extraordinary experiences, transforming everyday moments into lifelong memories.

    Who fuels our passion?

    A tribe of visionaries and perfectionists. From engineers who breathe life into circuits to storytellers who shape your experience, our team’s relentless pursuit of brilliance ensures that every ERAN product isn’t just purchased—it’s cherished.

    Why do we love what we do?

    Our Dedicated Team of Dreamers and Craftsmen Work Tirelessly to Provide Quality Service.

description_html:
The HP MC400 is an ultra-compact mini portable smart projector designed for family entertainment, student dorm rooms, and everyday home use. Its lightweight design and built-in smart features deliver an easy, enjoyable home theater experience.

With a built-in App Store and wireless screen mirroring from iOS and Android devices, this smart projector makes it easy to share movies, cartoons, games, and videos for family movie nights or student entertainment.

Featuring a short throw design and flexible placement, the MC400 creates a large screen in small spaces such as bedrooms, dorms, and apartments. 45W USB-C power bank support also makes it a reliable portable projector for outdoor movie nights and travel.

Specifications

  • Display Technology: 1LCD
  • Light Source: LED, lifespan > 20,000 hours
  • Native Resolution: HD 1280 × 720
  • Brightness: 150 ISO Lumens
  • Aspect Ratio: 16:9
  • Throw Ratio: 0.9
  • Focus: Auto Focus
  • Keystone: Auto Keystone + 4-Point Correction
  • CPU: H726 Quad-Core (A53)
  • Memory: 1GB RAM + 16GB Storage
  • System Platform: Built-in App Store & WiFi Projection
  • WiFi: Dual Band 2.4G / 5G
  • Bluetooth: Bluetooth 5.4 (Audio Output)
  • Speaker: 3W × 1
  • Ports: HDMI × 1, USB × 1, 3.5mm Audio × 1
  • Power Input: USB-C PD 3.0, 20V / 2.25A
  • Power Consumption: Approx. 40W
  • Dimensions (without stand): 91 × 82 × 138 mm
  • Weight: 490g

What’s in the Box

  • HP MC400 × 1
  • Power Adapter × 1
  • Power Plug × 1
  • Remote Control × 1
  • Quick Start Guide × 1
  • HP Warranty Card × 1
  • Product Notice × 1
  • OE Clean Kit × 1

title: Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Mini Projector, 4K 1080P Support Portable Wireless Movie Projectors 220° Rotatable 130'' Screen Auto Keystone Compatible with HDMI/iPhone/TV Stick for Bedroom Indoor
bullet_points: 【Portable Projector & 220° Rotation】Weighing only 1.5 pounds and measuring 5.5 x 4.7 x 8.6 inches, the projector easily fits into a backpack to carry around and enjoy family movie night anytime. Equipped with a base that rotates 220° vertically for flexible projection - from floor to wall and ceiling. Projection sizes range from 40-130 inches, providing flexible viewing options for any space. For the best viewing experience, we recommend a projection distance of 5.51 feet and projection size of 60 inches. Note: The movie projector does not include batteries and must be plugged in

【Built-in Android TV 11.0 & 4K Decoding】Equipped with Android TV 11.0 system, this projector for bedroom allows you to download your favorite apps, easily enjoy a massive collection of over 500,000 movies and TV shows. ( If you encounter a system update prompt, please confirm the update. Otherwise, some applications (such as D+) may be incompatible and unusable.) Proyector features LCD projection technology, 200 ANSI lumens brightness, and 1300:1 contrast ratio, and supports 1080P/4K decoding and native 720P resolution. The colors are vibrant and lifelike, restoring the true visual effect

【Automatic Vertical Keystone & Manual Focus】The projector features automatic vertical keystone correction to ensure a perfect display at any vertical angle. If the image is blurry, you can also manually rotate the lens ring to adjust the lens focus, quickly adjusting the image to the best condition. Anyone of any age can easily use this projector. Please note: This feature only corrects vertically (up and down). It does not support 4-point or horizontal keystone correction, and it does not include auto focus. To adjust focus, please use the manual focus ring

【 Dual-Band WiFi6 & Screen Mirroring】The wifi projector supports 5G+2.4G dual-band WiFi 6 connection, which makes the connection more stable and smooth, and rejects the lagging experience. It also supports Miracast, AirPlay, DLNA, and other wireless casting protocols, which can be easily connected to your phone and tablet. To use AirPlay screen mirroring, the first step is to open the “AICast” app on the projector. Reminder: Due to HDCP copyright restrictions, the projector does not support wireless mirroring of streaming services directly from your phone. We recommend using the TV Stick Lite (not included) with our projector

【Bluetooth 5.0 & Speaker】The small projector has built-in Bluetooth 5.0 and speakers for an immersive theater-quality audio experience at all times. If you connect the projector to a Bluetooth speaker, you can also get richer and more powerful sound. Please note: Bluetooth connectivity is only for audio transfer with audio devices and cannot be used for smartphone screen mirroring

【Compatible Multi-device】The projector comes with HDMI, USB, and 3.5mm audio jacks for easy connection to external devices such as laptops, TV sticks, and USB flash drives (Note: HDMI and USB cables are not included). After inserting the HDMI cable, you need to use the remote control to set it to HDMI signal input for normal use. This mini projector with wifi and bluetooth is affordable and ideal for creating proyector de cine en casa, outdoor evening recreation, and yoga exercise moments

【After-Sales Service】We are committed to earning your long-term support, not just focusing on short-term sales growth. That's why we offer a comprehensive after-sales service that includes a 30-day money-back guarantee, a 12-month repair warranty, and lifetime technical support. Even if your order exceeds the platform's return period, we'll make sure you get the help and service you need

Note: 1) Projectors generate heat, so please allow sufficient space for heat dissipation to prevent overheating and malfunction. 2) Laptops and desktop computers cannot connect to the projector via Bluetooth. Only HDMI cables can be used for connection.

About this item

  • 【Portable Projector & 220° Rotation】Weighing only 1.5 pounds and measuring 5.5 x 4.7 x 8.6 inches, the projector easily fits into a backpack to carry around and enjoy family movie night anytime. Equipped with a base that rotates 220° vertically for flexible projection - from floor to wall and ceiling. Projection sizes range from 40-130 inches, providing flexible viewing options for any space. For the best viewing experience, we recommend a projection distance of 5.51 feet and projection size of 60 inches. Note: The movie projector does not include batteries and must be plugged in
  • 【Built-in Android TV 11.0 & 4K Decoding】Equipped with Android TV 11.0 system, this projector for bedroom allows you to download your favorite apps, easily enjoy a massive collection of over 500,000 movies and TV shows. ( If you encounter a system update prompt, please confirm the update. Otherwise, some applications (such as D+) may be incompatible and unusable.) Proyector features LCD projection technology, 200 ANSI lumens brightness, and 1300:1 contrast ratio, and supports 1080P/4K decoding and native 720P resolution. The colors are vibrant and lifelike, restoring the true visual effect
  • 【Automatic Vertical Keystone & Manual Focus】The projector features automatic vertical keystone correction to ensure a perfect display at any vertical angle. If the image is blurry, you can also manually rotate the lens ring to adjust the lens focus, quickly adjusting the image to the best condition. Anyone of any age can easily use this projector. Please note: This feature only corrects vertically (up and down). It does not support 4-point or horizontal keystone correction, and it does not include auto focus. bullet_points: [Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth] Equipped with 2.4G + 5G dual-band WiFi, this WISHOLY projector enables ultra-fast and stable screen mirroring without lag or frame drops. Even without a WiFi network, you can still mirror your phone using cellular data via a simple, one-step setup—no cables or adapters needed. Please note: Due to copyright restrictions, streaming content from apps like Hulu, and Prime Video cannot be mirrored via WiFi

[ Portable Bluetooth Projector] Connect your WISHOLY projector to Bluetooth speakers for richer, more powerful sound, or pair it with headphones for a private, immersive viewing experience without disturbing others. Please Note: Bluetooth connection is only for audio transmission with audio devices, which cannot be used on smartphone screen mirroring

[180° Rotatable Video Projector] Featuring a 180° adjustable stand, this 1080p projector allows you to effortlessly project from any angle—whether on a table, bedside, wall-mounted, or even the ceiling—providing flexible viewing options for any space

[Auto Vertical Keystone Correction] The movie projector features automatic vertical keystone correction, instantly adjusting the image for a perfectly aligned, distortion-free display—no manual adjustments needed for a seamless viewing experience

[Endless Entertainment with TV Stick] Just plug your TV Stick (not included) into the home projector and start streaming millions of videos from services like Amazon Prime Video, Hulu, and more. No TV Stick? No problem! You can easily connect a laptop or computer via HDMI for endless entertainment

[ Outdoor Projector with 1080P Support] Enjoy breathtaking visuals with 1080P resolution support, providing sharper and more detailed images. Whether you're at home or outdoors, experience your favorite content in vibrant clarity and immersive quality

[Compact & Portable Design] This projector is designed for ultimate portability, measuring just 4.72 x 5.2 x 7.28 inches and weighing only 2.3 lbs. Take it anywhere with ease, whether you're traveling, hosting an outdoor movie night, or setting up a home theater in any room

[ Exceptional After-Sales Service ] Enjoy peace of mind with our comprehensive after-sales assistance, including a 30-day money-back guarantee, a 12-month repair protection, and lifetime technical support. Whether you're geting it as a video projector for personal use or as a gift, this small projector alternative is a reliable choice

title: Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, 4K Projector with 5W Soundbase Speaker, Portable Projector for Bedroom, 300 ANSI Lumens Smart Projector, 270° Rotation Automatic Vertical Keystone Correction
bullet_points: 【5W Bass-Boosted Audio: All-in-One Immersive Sound】 Feel the difference with our upgraded 5W built-in speaker, now integrated directly into the rotating base. Enjoy richer bass and crystal-clear audio that outperforms the previous PR06 model. Wherever you are, fill the room with immersive, theater-like sound—no external speakers needed. Perfect for turning any movie projector night into a cinematic experience.

【Ultra-Portable Cinema: Lightweight & 270° Rotating Base】 At just 1.4 lbs, the HOTPEAK PR08 is your go-anywhere entertainment hub. Toss it in your bag and set up your personal portable projector in seconds. The 270° rotating base lets you project onto any surface—walls, floors, or ceilings—with total flexibility. Watch on a massive 35–130 inch screen, perfect for outdoor projector movie nights, gaming, video calls, or kids' learning. (Note: Requires power outlet; no built-in battery.)

【Vivid Big-Screen Visuals: 4K-Ready & Bright HD Display】 Bring your favorite shows and movies to life with brilliant picture quality. Advanced LED tech, 300 ANSI lumens brightness, and a 1500:1 contrast ratio deliver vibrant, true-to-life colors. Ready for 4k projector decoding and native 720p resolution, this mini projector ensures sharp, stunning visuals—day or night.

【Smart Entertainment Built-In: Android TV 11.0 & Wi-Fi 6】 Comes fully loaded with Android TV 11.0 and is compatible with all your go-to apps: YouTube, Prime Video, and more. Instantly explore over 500,000 movies and series. Next-gen Wi-Fi 6 eliminates buffering for incredibly smooth streaming. Plus, with built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, connecting is a breeze. (Tip: Keep your system updated to ensure all apps run at their best.)

【Set Up in Seconds: Auto Keystone & Quick Focus】 No more fiddling with settings. Automatic vertical keystone correction instantly straightens the image from any up or down angle. Then, a simple twist of the focus ring gives you razor-sharp clarity in seconds. Ideal for bedroom projector setups or impromptu outdoor movie projector sessions. (Note: Horizontal keystone correction and auto focus are not available.)

【Cinema-Grade Sound: Bluetooth 5.0 & Audio Enhancements】 Why settle for basic sound? While the PR08 comes with a built-in speaker, elevate your audio by pairing it instantly with Bluetooth speakers or headphones. Create a true surround sound experience that brings movies and music to life. Perfect for bluetooth projector setups and home theater projector systems. (Note: Bluetooth supports audio devices and mice only—smartphone pairing is not available.)

【Connect It All: Versatile Ports & Wireless Mirroring】 Hook up your favorite devices with ease. Equipped with HDMI, USB, and audio ports, the PR08 works seamlessly with laptops, TV Sticks, gaming consoles, and more. Just connect, select your HDMI source, and hit play. (Cables not included.) For wireless screen mirroring, use the "AICast" app. (Heads-up: Some streaming apps restrict direct phone mirroring. For full access, we recommend using a TV Stick Lite.)

【Your Satisfaction, Guaranteed: We’ve Got Your Back】 We’re here for the long run. That’s why every PR08 comes with our 360° Support Promise: a 30-day money-back guarantee, 12-month repair warranty, and lifetime technical support. Even after the standard return window closes, we’re committed to your complete satisfaction.
