Enjoy crisp 1080p visuals that support 4K content playback. Stream or play 4K videos with cinema-quality clarity, ideal for projector for bedroom or outdoor projector setups

Auto Keystone & E Focus：Auto Keystone will automatically correct any keystone distortion within a range of vertical ±30°/horizontal ±15°. Use the remote control to electronically adjust the focus. 360° Adjustable Stand：The stand can be adjusted 360°, you can put any angle you want to watch, for example, in the bedroom when you can lie on the bed to throw the picture to the ceiling to watch. It is easy to install and remove without additional tools, and easy to store in a backpack.

title: Smart Projector【1000 ANSI/Compatible with Netflix】4K Projector with WiFi 6 and 2-Way Bluetooth, AI Auto Focus & Keystone, 20W Dolby Audio,Built-in Apps,TOPTRO A1 Portable Proyector for Outdoor Movie
bullet_points: TOPTRO A1 All-in-One 4K Smart Portable Projector | Exceptional Value.This smart projector with WiFi and Bluetooth redefines home entertainment by delivering premium features at an exceptional value. The built-in Linux system lets you instantly stream movies and sports without extra devices. Weighing only 1.26kg and compact enough to hold in one hand, it's your perfect portable home theater. Enjoy crystal-clear HD visuals combined with Dolby Audio that creates an immersive 360° surround sound experience. Whether you're new to projectors or a home cinema enthusiast, the TOPTRO A1 offers the perfect balance of stunning picture quality and theater-like audio.

【Fully Compatible with Netflix | Seamless Streaming Experience】Entertainment Ecosystem Step into a world of boundless entertainment with a device fully compatible with Netflix. Enjoy instant access to major platforms like Netflix, Prime Video, and YouTube, or explore a vast video library of over 2 million 、 via the built-in app store and open browser. Regular system updates keep your applications secure, stable, and up-to-date, ensuring a smooth and worry-free viewing experience. (Note: HBO Max and Apple TV are not currently supported.)

【Vivid AI-Optimized Visuals | 1000 ANSI | 4K decoding丨HDR10+】Transform any space into a cinema with TOPTRO A1 4K projector. Enjoy vibrant, true-to-life colors powered by 1000 ANSI lumens, 4K decoding HDR10+, and AI image optimization covering 98% NTSC gamut. Whether you are there during the day or at night, our outdoor 4K projectors can provide you with the best viewing experience. The eye-comfort mode reduces blue light for those long movie nights. Videos labeled as "4K" will play at a native resolution of 1080P, a mode often referred to as '4K decoding'

【Cinema-Grade Sound | Dolby Audio & Two-Way Bluetooth】Equipped with powerful 20W speakers and Dolby Audio technology for an immersive 3D sound experience. Combined with advanced AI sound balance, enjoy smooth vocals and natural instrumental sound. With two-way Bluetooth functionality, it doubles as a standalone speaker—simply pair with your phone to enjoy music anytime. For even more immersive sound, easily connect to your home audio system via HDMI ARC. Whether used as a Bluetooth projector or a wireless speaker, it offers outstanding flexibility and superior audio performance.

【AI Auto-adjustment | Perfect for Ceiling Mount & Instant Setup】Smart AI technology automatically handles focus, keystone correction, screen alignment, and obstacle avoidance — specially tuned for ceiling installations. Get a perfectly squared, crystal-clear image in just 1 second, with zero manual adjustments. It can be securely installed using four M4 screw holes and a central 1/4'' thread on the bottom.Plus, 50–100% digital zoom lets you resize the screen on the fly — no need to move the projector. Perfect for home movie night,backyard entertaining under the stars, or professional presentations in a home office — this ceiling projector delivers big-screen brilliance anywhere, effortlessly

【WiFi 6 | Unleash Lag-Free Mirroring & Streaming.】Experience lightning-fast, crystal-clear streaming with next-gen WiFi 6—boasting speeds up to 9.6 Gbps for a nearly 3x boost over WiFi 5. Effortlessly connect gaming consoles, laptops, TV sticks, hard drives, or mobile devices via a full suite of ports (HDMI ARC, USB, 3.5mm audio) and advanced wireless protocols. Seamlessly share your screen for work or family moments using AirPlay (iOS), Miracast (Android/Windows), or DLNA. From intense PS5 gaming to a home outdoor movie night, this projector with WiFi and Bluetooth delivers ultra-smooth, low-latency performance that brings everyone funny

【Reliable Performance丨 Worry-Free Enjoyment】Designed for lasting durability, the TOPTRO A1 features a sealed optical engine and advanced dual-fan cooling system. This technology enhances dust resistance, improves heat dissipation, and significantly reduces operating noise—extending LCD screen life while delivering a truly quiet, immersive viewing experience. Backed by professional support and comprehensive warranty coverage including 1-year free replacement + 3-year warranty. *Note: Remote requires 2x AAA batteries (not included). Contact us for remote replacement if lost or damaged.

bullet_points: [Stream Without Limits - Built-in APPs, Compatible with Netflix] The ONO3Pro 2.0 outdoor projector brings the world’s top streaming platforms to your fingertips—no extra devices needed. Compatible with Netflix, YouTube, Prime Video, Apple TV, Disney+, Live TV, and over 1.2 million videos in stunning clarity. With regular updates, your movie projector stays ahead with the latest features, enhanced security, and uninterrupted stability—so your entertainment is always fresh, legal, and buffer-free, wherever you go

[Your Home Theater, Smarter - 2026 Smart TV OS 2.0] The ONO3Pro 2.0 projector with wif and bluetooth is the world’s first smart projector with a self-developed Smart TV OS 2.0, revolutionizing home entertainment. Powered by AI-driven algorithms and a next-gen processing chip, it delivers 3x faster performance than standard projectors—enjoy: 1)Lightning speed: Boot up in seconds, switch apps instantly, and stream without lag. 2)Seamless versatility: Perfect for movies, gaming, and browsing with millisecond-level response.3) Smart customization: Personalize your home screen, use the built-in E-manual, or activate one-click wake-up screen projection

[Detail-first Visual Feast - 2000 ANSI | Support 4K] The ONO3Pro 2.0 4K projector delivers true 2000 ANSI brightness and 4K video decoding to unlock the pinnacle of visual performance. Its intelligent AI image optimization system automatically matches color gamut schemes and simulates up to 98% of the NTSC cinematic-wide color gamut. Each frame is meticulously reconstructed with millions of color particles, presenting realistic details with precision. Whether it's a strand of hair floating in the dust or the trajectory of a leaping flame, everything is vividly brought to life, leaving viewers in awe

[Auditory Revolution - Dolby Audio with eARC | AI Sound Balancing] Experience cinema-grade sound with this home projector’s Dolby Audio Hi-Fi stereo dual 30W speakers, delivering an immersive 3D surround sound that pulls you into the heart of the action. The eARC feature enables high-bandwidth, uncompressed audio for studio-quality clarity—every detail is heard exactly as intended. Combined with cutting-edge AI sound balancing technology, it delivers delicate sound quality with smooth transitions. Beyond visuals, this Bluetooth projector doubles as a standalone speaker or seamlessly pairs with external speakers—unlocking a full spectrum of theater-quality audio for every use

[Instant Clarity - AI Auto Adjustment with 3s] This ceiling projector is equipped with fully automatic focus, keystone correction, obstacle avoidance, screen-fit, and projection orientation detection. By an advanced AI adjustment algorithm, it outperforms conventional projectors in speed and precision, delivering razor-sharp images and perfect alignment in just 3 seconds—even on tilted surfaces. Whether it is side projection, ceiling, or a complex environment, the projector can adjust to the best state autonomously, allowing you to immerse yourself in the best viewing experience. The zoom function allows for size adjustments from 50% to 100% without moving the projector

[Take It Anywhere -Your First Choice Portable Projector] With its breakthrough internal design, at just 2.4lb, and 80% smaller than others with similar brightness. The handheld design, portability, and ease of transport ensure that the thrill of a large-screen experience is always within reach anywhere. With the latest WiFi 6 tech, this wifi projector offers ultra-fast speeds and superior stability. Built-in Chromecast, easy to Cast Your Favorite Content. Whether indoors or outdoors, it turns every visual experience into an unforgettable moment. Supports multiple installation methods: desktop/tripod/ wall/ceiling mounting (an M4 screw port at the bottom)

[Reliability Service - Durability Meets Superior Support] ONO3Pro 2.0 mini projector features a sealed optical engine and dual-fan cooling, superior in dust resistance and heat dissipation, extending its lifespan and preventing issues like black or yellow screens. With dual auto temperature control systems, which ensure stable operation of the projector through precise temperature monitoring and an adjustment mechanism. As a company that focuses on long-term development, no matter how long you have purchased it, our service is always consistent and we are always ready to provide you with inquiries or assistance

title: LJYT Mini Projector, 250 ANSI Lumens, Support 4K, Auto Keystone, 210° Rotation, Bluetooth 5.4, WiFi 6, Android 11, 1080P Portable, Compatible with Smartphone/TV Stick/HDMI/USB/PS5.
bullet_points: 【Native 1080P & 250 ANSI Lumens】 Enjoy stunning image quality with native 1080P resolution and 250 ANSI lumens brightness. Whether you're watching movies, playing games, or sharing photos, every detail comes to life. It also supports 4K input, giving you future-ready viewing options.

【WiFi 6 & Bluetooth 5.3】 LJYT HP330 projector is equipped with the latest WiFi 6 technology, supporting 2.4G/5G dual-band connection for faster streaming, smoother playback, and no buffering—even for 4K videos. It also features Bluetooth 5.3, allowing you to easily connect to Bluetooth speakers, headphones, or other audio devices for an upgraded sound experience. Note: Bluetooth supports audio devices only, not smartphone mirroring.

【Android 11& App Store】 Built with Android 11 system, the HP330 gives you direct access to popular streaming platforms like YouTube, Prime Video, and more—no TV stick or external box needed. You can also download additional apps from the built-in app store, making it a complete entertainment hub for your family.

【Auto Keystone & Electric Focus】 Say goodbye to complicated setup. This portable projector supports automatic vertical keystone correction and electric focus adjustment—just press the button on the remote, and you’ll get a perfectly clear and rectangular image in seconds. Whether on a table, bedside, or ceiling, it adapts to your space effortlessly.

【Great Gift Choice｜210° Rotation 】 Looking for a thoughtful gift? The LJYT HP330 comes with a 210° rotatable base, allowing you to project on walls, ceilings, or anywhere you like. Lightweight, stylish, and easy to use, it’s ideal for movie nights, outdoor camping, or kids’ entertainment. We back it with 7/24 tech support, so your loved ones can enjoy it with total peace of mind.
description_text: LJYT HP330 Portable Projector – Smart Entertainment Anywhere Experience stunning visuals with native 1080P resolution and 250 ANSI lumens brightness. Supports 4K input for future-ready viewing. Powered by Android 11, enjoy direct access to YouTube, Prime Video, and more—no external TV stick needed. Built-in app store lets you download additional streaming apps. WiFi 6 ensures buffer-free streaming for 4K videos. Bluetooth 5.3 connects to external speakers or headphones (note: audio devices only, not for phone mirroring). Auto keystone and electric focus via remote control make setup effortless. 210° rotatable base allows projection on walls, ceilings, or any surface. Compatible with TV sticks (Fire TV, Roku), HDMI devices (gaming consoles, laptops), USB drives, and smartphones. Lightweight and portable for indoor and outdoor use. Includes: projector, remote, HDMI cable, user manual. 24/7 technical support.

title: Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, 4k Support Full Hd 1080P Portable Outdoor Movie Projector with Android System & Built-in Apps, Smart Proyector for Bedroom, Phone and Movie Night
bullet_points: 【Smart Projector with Built-in App—Stream Anytime, Anywhere】 - This Netflix-compatible projector comes with built-in streaming apps for ultimate convenience. Whether you're cozying up in bed for a relaxing night or camping under the stars, just tap to access thousands of movies and shows from Netflix, Prime Video, YouTube, and more. With smooth performance, vivid visuals, and reliable stability, this video projector delivers an immersive big-screen viewing experience anytime, anywhere.(Note: Please point the remote control at the projector when using it.)

【Ultra-Short-Throw Projector | 270° Rotatable Portable Projector】This mini portable projector features an ultra-short throw ratio of 0.8:1, capable of projecting a 30-200 inches screen from a close distance. It's perfect for creating an immersive viewing experience in confined spaces. Measuring just 3.6*3.34*6.1 inches and weighing only 1.54 pounds, it's incredibly portable and fits effortlessly into any bag. Its 270° rotation capability allows projection from virtually any angle—whether in your living room, bedroom, office, RV, camping or outdoor movie night setting—making big-screen entertainment possible anytime, anywhere

【1080P and 4K Support】The TryLand Mini Projector 4K utilizes LCD lighting technology to deliver native 720P resolution while supporting 1080P and 4K playback. With 200 ANSI, a wide color gamut, and a 10,000:1 contrast ratio, it delivers vivid, lifelike, and immersive visuals for movies, TV shows, and gaming. Note: For 4K playback, connect via HDMI to a 4K-compatible device (e.g., Fire Stick). Content labeled as 4K will play at its native resolution, commonly referred to as "4K support." Affordable projector for family movie night, kids room, birthday or holiday gift

【Lightning-Fast WiFi 6 Technology & Bluetooth 5.2】This small projector features built-in advanced WiFi 6 and Bluetooth capabilities, enabling ultra-fast wireless mirroring from your phone, tablet, or laptop to the screen. With Bluetooth 5.2, you can instantly connect speakers for seamless wireless audio setup. Say goodbye to messy cables and enjoy a clean, clutter-free entertainment space. Additionally, this compact projector features built-in HDMI, USB, and 3.5mm headphone ports. Compatible with iPhone, Android, and Windows systems, it easily connects to devices like TV sticks, smartphones, laptops, USB drives, and PS5 consoles

【Auto Vertical Keystone | 100%–80% Zoom】This smart projector features automatic vertical keystone correction, which eliminates distorted images and ensures proper alignment even on uneven surfaces. A smooth focus wheel allows you to fine-tune clarity in seconds. Zoom seamlessly from 100% down to 80% without moving the movie projector, with a maximum projection size of 200 inches. Whether placed on a desk, bookshelf, or mounted on the ceiling, you can quickly enjoy a clear and perfectly aligned image

title: 1080P Mini Projector with Screen, Portable Home Theater Movie Projector with Two-Way Bluetooth, HDMI/USB Input for Smartphone/TV Stick, Ideal for Indoor & Outdoor Use
bullet_points: 【Upgraded Two-way Bluetooth 5.2 & HIFI Speaker】Built-in powerful speakers, this portable bluetooth projector provides HIFI sound effect while watching movie in a Max 200 inches screen. The updated Two-way Bluetooth function is not only supported to connect with your bluetooth speaker wirelessly, but also you can use this mini projector as a bluetooth speaker to listen music from your phone. Enlarge your happiness with our Bluetooth projector, just enjoy it!

【50% Brighter Images than Similar Projectors 】2025 Upgraded mini projector equipped with 8000:1 contrast ratio, supported 1080p resolution, brings you a 50% brighter images than similar projectors in market. It provides you with a premium home cinema experience with the bigger screen and clearer image.

【50% More Clear Images than Similar Projectors 】2025 Upgraded Chips make this movie projector more clear than other similar projectors. Our technical department researched and upgraded the chip to improve the clarity of the picture, so you can enjoy the movie everywhere and anytime.

【Low Noise & Long Lamp Life】The portable projector is lower in noise and more durable than previous models thanks to advanced fan cooling technology. Powerful cooling system cools the heat of lamp efficiently, extending the bulb life to 50,000 hours, which means you can use it more than 15 years.

【Multiple Input, Compatible with Most Devices】This home projector is fit for playing videos, TV series, photos sharing, football matches etc. It can be easily connected with laptops, smartphones, tablets, USB drives, X-Box to enjoy big games. You can enjoy movies and happyniess everywhere anytime. ★★★Please kindly note projectors with mirrored are incompatible with Hulu due to copyright issues, you can use TV Stick to play.★★★

【Smartphone Connection Instruction】 This mini phone projector can be compatible with phones and tablets, if you want to connect the phone or tablet, please prepare a HDMI adapter cable. For ios device, you need to use the official Lightning to HDMI adapter to connect your phone with projector. (HDMI adapter is not included.) For Android device, if your phone supports MHL, then you can use the micro usb/type-c to HDMI cable to connect your phone with projector. (HDMI cable is not included.) If your phone does not support MHL, you should prepare a Chrome-cast to connect your phone with projector.

  8. PANSEBA believes in the power of innovation and keeps infusing Latest technology into our home projectors.

    There are too many unpredictable in future, what we should do is to grasp the present and enjoy the present. Our mission is to use advanced projection technology to let everyone enjoy the visual feast at Cinema level and enjoy the happy time with family and friends!

  9. How did we get our start?

    Compare with business projector which is big and valued a lot, why can not make a home projector which is small, portable and everyone can afford it.

title: [Sound by JBL & Built-in Battery] Yaber T2 Outdoor Projector with WiFi 6 and Bluetooth, Native 1080P Smart Movie Portable Projector for Inside and Outside, Compatible with TV Dongle (Not included)
bullet_points: 【Built-in Battery | Independently Developed | Rechargeable Portable Projector】The new independently developed YABER T2 outdoor projector with an advanced high-capacity battery, offers up to 2.5 hours of video playback or 18 hours of audio. Featuring a handle that doubles as a projector stand with 15 degrees of tilt, it's ideal for movie projectors when camping, traveling, or at parties, allowing you to watch a full movie anywhere without a power outlet.

【Looks Better | Native 1080P】The YABER T2 outdoor movie projector overcomes the three major issues of non-fully sealed optical machines: light leakage, dust accumulation, and high noise. It delivers true native 1080P resolution allowing for clear visibility of every action, play, and point on screens up to 120 inches diagonally. This home theater projector's sharp image quality reaches screen edges, ideal for binge-watching series and catching subtitles.

【 Sounds Perfect | JBL & Dolby Audio | 8W*2 Speakers 】 The T2 projector sets new standards with its unparalleled Audio and Dolby Sound. Get rich sound details, crystal clear highs, and rich, powerful bass without investing in additional equipment. In addition, the T2 Bluetooth projector supports two-way Bluetooth transmission, which can not only connect to mobile devices and transform into a 16W Hi-Fi stereo speaker, but can also be paired with external Bluetooth speakers for exceptional audio.

【Smart Screen | Space Saving】The portable smart projector makes setup a breeze with its smart features. It can avoid obstacles, align the image to your screen, and keep the image sharp. No more worrying about removing wall decor or images spilling over your screen edges. With a 1.25:1 throw ratio, the T2 short throw projector saves 1.54 ft of distance for a 100'' screen compared to other traditional proyectors, Aspect ratios of 4:3 and 16:9, 50% zoom, bring a diverse viewing experience.

【Multiple Connections | WiFi 6 & Bluetooth】The smart projector offers versatile connectivity options to make your work and life more convenience. It supports Ethernet, HDMI, and audio jacks for wired connections, and you can easily access documents via a USB drive reading WPS files.Wireless connections are robust with the latest WiFi 6 and Bluetooth technologies. The Yaber app uses NFC for quick connections and eventurns your phone into a remote. ！！！！24/7 support, 6-month returns, 3-year repairs.

【Attention】The Yaber T2 projector offers varied viewing options. Opt for our T2 Google TV dongle（Purchase separately) to access streaming services like Netflix and Disney+ directly through the projector. Alternatively, choose not to purchase the dongle and utilize other casting methods like YouTube. Whatever your preference, the T2 meets your home entertainment needs.

title: [3000+ Licensed Apps/Live TV/HDR10+/AI Movin 3.0 OS] Smart 4K-Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Goiaey Portable Projector with 360°Stand, 50W DoIby Audio, Auto Focus&Keystone, Outdoor Movie Proyector
bullet_points: ➤ AI MOVIN 3.0 System for Superior Performance----Powered by the advanced AI MOVIN 3.0 system, Goiaey upgrade GO2 projector with wifi and bluetooth delivers enhanced system stability and ultra-smooth operation. Enjoy faster response times, seamless navigation, and a significantly improved user experience for both entertainment and everyday use.

➤ One-Click Access to 3,000+ Licensed Apps & Live TV Entertainment----Download and install apps instantly with just one click. This smart tv projector comes with access to over 3,000 genuine, officially licensed apps like NetfIIx, YouTube, prime video, Disny+, HuIu without extra devices, giving you endless entertainment options and a convenient, secure, and user-friendly movie projector experience. Built-in Live TV brings real-time news, sports, and shows straight to your big screen—no extra devices needed, making this projector a true all-in-one home entertainment hub.

➤ 360°Portable Outdoor 4K Projector with HDR10+---- Enjoy true cinematic freedom anywhere with this home theater projector featuring HDR10+ technology. Delivering vivid colors, deep contrast, and immersive detail, it’s perfect for outdoor movie nights, gaming, or home cinema, while its 360° projection flexibility ensures the ideal viewing experience from any angle.

➤ Built-in Chromecast + WiFi 6 & Two-Way Bluetooth 5.2----Goiaey upgrade GO2 also can be as a phone projector which can cast movies, shows, and apps instantly with built-in non-DRM Chromecast. Featured with private cast allows the video is keeping playing meanwhile your phone can be in sleep mode or you can also use your phone to do something else except watching other videos. Enjoy faster, more reliable streaming with Wi-Fi 6, and connect headphones or speakers via two-way Bluetooth 5.2 (send & receive). Or use this wireless projector as a standalone Bluetooth speaker with built-in a 50W speaker(NO EXTRA SPEAKER NEDDED);

➤ AI Low Latency Mode for Seamless Streaming & Gaming----Gamers will love the AI Low Latency Game Mode, which can automatically minimizes input lag for ultra-responsive gaming and real-time screen mirroring such as on Xbox, PS5, or Switch, delivering smooth, uninterrupted entertainment. With HDMI, USB, and 3.5mm audio ports, it's a full-featured hub for your home theater or outdoor adventures.

➤ AI Real-Time Autofocus, Auto Keystone&Auto Obstacle Avoidance&Smart Setup Detection ----Effortless, Perfect Picture Every Time – Equipped with intelligent AI technology, Goiaey upgrade GO2 auto focus projector instantly adjusts focus and automatically corrects keystone distortion in real time even it is moving! Featured auto obstacle avoidance function detects and works around obstacles automatically. Smart Setup Detection recognizes changes in placement and environment, ensuring a perfectly aligned, sharp image within seconds—no manual tuning required. PS: Please make sure the function is enabled before starting.

➤ Unparalleled DoIby Effect with 50W 360° SRS HiFi Sound----Let New Version GO2 outdoor movie projector immerse yourself in rich, room-filling audio powered by a massive 50W speaker system! The 360° SRS HiFi sound delivers deep bass, crystal-clear highs, and an unparalleled Dolby audio experience, transforming any space into a true home theater with cinematic sound from every direction.P.S:Due to the ultra-high brightness, the internal fan operates at a higher speed to dissipate heat, which may result in some noise. We recommend maintaining a distance of at least 3.5 ft from this portable video projector.

➤ 1:1 Throw Ratio and 50000:1 Contrast Ratio and Giant Display Size----The upgrade GO2 short throw projector projects a 100" image from just 8 feet—30% closer than standard home projectors (others require 10.8 ft). With same projection distance, the image size is 30% larger than others. Contrast is the difference between the darkest part of the image and the brightest. 50,000:1 ratio delivers deeper blacks and brighter whites—no washed-out images, just lifelike clarity. Adjust from 50" to 500" (4-25 ft distance)—the largest scalable display in its class. (Recommended: 100" for optimal viewing)

➤ Reliable After-Sales Service and 100,000 Hours LED----This smart projector with wifi and bluetooth has a sealed engine to prevent dust better and dual fan system to prevent yellow screens or dark spots, extending the lifespan to 2 times longer than others. With 3 hours of daily use, it can last over 90 years. Be confident of our quality, we provide a 1-year replacement, 3-year repair and lifetime technical support. If you have any questions about the projector, let us know and we’ll provide solutions within 24 business hours.

➤ Portable Size and Versatile Mounting Options----The size of the ceiling/wall/home/window projector is 9.45*7.87*5.51 inches, easy to carry from living rooms and bedrooms or outdoor. Compatible with tripods, ceiling mounts, tables, and walls. Features a standard M4 screw hole (bottom) for easy installation.

  5. Innovation meets affordability

    Founded in 2020, our mission is “Bringing high-quality projectors to customers”. We set out to create projectors that combine brightness, clarity, intelligence and full automation.

    Every product undergoes rigorous testing to ensure sharp resolution, vibrant colors, and long-lasting performance. Whether for movie nights, gaming, or business presentations, our projectors are designed to exceed expectations.

  6. How can I troubleshoot quickly?

    Please reach out to us via official address in the manual for any issues. You’ll get a reply within 24 business hours.

    What to do if my order past the return window?

    All of our products come with 2 times longer war-ranty than others. Please let us know via the official address in the manual.

    How to extend the lifespan of the Projector?

    Proper Ventilation+Regular Cleaning+Correct Shutdown+Optimal Usage Time+Stable Power Supply+Lamp/Bulb Care+Proper Storage

    If needed, please reach out to us for more details.

bullet_points: 「Smart TV Projector」The Goodee AC321 4K projector is officially licensed by mainstream streaming platforms such as Netflix/YouTube/Prime Video, offering over 10000 streaming channels. One click access, no extra TV stick required. Built-in rich movies and TV resources platform and app store. By connecting to the network, easily access all kinds of popular movie and TV content. The Movin 2.0 OS is keepping update to ensure you have the latest features enhancing application security and stability

「Unlock Immersive Visual Feast」The Goodee AC321 Projector with wifi and bluetooth supports 4K video hardware decoding and output 1080p resolution smooth playback of high-definition video, audio and gaming, which accurates reproduction of every details. With 1200 ANSI lumens brightness, it is not afraid of ambient light and can output clear picture quality day and night. Enjoy big-screen entertainment anytime and anywhere, watching movies and variety shows or catching up with the latest games

「Auto Focus & Keystone Correction」The GooDee AC321 movie projector is packed with useful features. The auto focus function quickly makes the picture clear in seconds; advanced keystone correction can be or intelligent automatic adjustment, accurate correction of vertical and horizontal trapezoidal distortion, even if the placement position is not good, the screen can be restored to the rectangle. Wide correction range, adapt to complex projection environment, viewing is not limited

「AI Image & Dolby Audio Experience」The Goodee AC321 Movie projector, built-in AI image quality optimization technology, using deep learning algorithms to analyze and optimize the picture pixels in real time, accurately restore and enhance the HDR10+ color, 25000:1 contrast ratio and sharpness, sci-fi blockbuster visual impact. It is equipped with Bluetooth 5.4 for fast and stable connection, and built-in Dolby Audio speakers for immersive audio enjoyment

Product description

Previous page
Next page

  1. EAGLE EYE 3.0 AI Optimization

    Auto Obstacle Avoidance


    Through AI object recognition, detect obstacles in the projection path (such as wall sockets, decorative paintings), and automatically adjust the picture to avoid obstructions and keep the image intact.

  2. EAGLE EYE 3.0 AI Optimization

    Auto Screen Alignment


    The sensor recognizes the outline of the screen frame, allowing the projected image to automatically adapt to the size of the screen without manually adjusting the edge of the screen.

  3. EAGLE EYE 3.0 AI Optimization

    Auto & Real-time Focus


    Identify the content of the screen (such as text, images) through AI, detect the clarity of the picture, optimize the focus accuracy, and adjust the lens focal length in real time to ensure that the image is always clear

  4. EAGLE EYE 3.0 AI Optimization

    Auto Keystone Correction


    By identifying the position of the four corners of the picture, when the projector is tilted, the trapezoidal deformed picture is automatically corrected to a rectangle.

All Protocol Casting GooDee AC321 is compatible with various different casting protocols, achieve seamless casting connections between different operating systems and different brand devices. Common casting protocols include: DLNA, AirPlay, Miracast
Flexible Installation The Goodee AC321 projector is equipped with 180° rotating stand and bottom 1/4" screw hole for mounting. Remove from stand, can be Ceiling mounted with compatible bracket (not included). It support Front/Rear projection adjustable via Settings > Picture > Projection Mode.

bullet_points: Dual Control Mode & Built-in Multiple Apps: Gaimoo GM200 smart projector can use wireless-mouse and remote control dual control mode, more convenient, the mouse is included in the package. GM200 smart projector is equipped with built-in multiple apps, you can access millions of videos without using an additional TV stick, including content from YouTube, D+, Video and other Apps

4K & 1080P Support: The projector's new LCD projection technology improves screen contrast and colour accuracy, and HDR delivers richer, more lifelike images by capturing, creating and displaying a wider range of brightness levels and colour depth. The projector is perfect for watching films and photos. The projector's native resolution is 720P and it supports video playback in 4K and 1080P formats

Built-in WiFi 6 and Two-way Bluetooth 5.2: GM200 projector provides a powerful and versatile connection experience with dual-band WiFi 6 and Bluetooth, which is faster and less interference. GM200 supports two-way Bluetooth 5.2 audio transmission, which can easily connect wireless speakers, headphones or speakers to the projector to enhance audio quality. The built-in HIFI speaker can also provide cinema-level sound effects, allowing you and your family to create a home theater anytime, anywhere

title: Mini Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth, Support 4K 170 ANSI Auto Keystone Correction, 5W Soundbase Speaker, 210° Rotatable Portable Projector, 25"-110" Screen Video Projector for Smartphone/Laptop
bullet_points: 【Upgraded Model】The HY300Ultra intelligent projector has been upgraded based on the HY300Pro. While ensuring strong performance, the volume is further reduced, and the product weighs only 0.8 pounds! The base mounted stereo speaker design further enhances the viewing experience. In addition, there is a screw hole at the bottom of the mini projector, and you can also mount the projector on a tripod.

【WIFI 6 Smart Projector】 Say goodbye to the traditional HDMI cable conversion projection, the smart projector with built-in WiFi6, faster transmission rate and lower transmission delay, easy and fast to connect to smartphones, laptops, etc., within 5 seconds to connect successfully. It provides a fast and stable projection for videos, games, and more.

【BT5.4 & Speaker Function】 This portable projector has a built-in Bluetooth 5.4 chip and speaker. You can pair the projector with headphones, speakers or other audio devices via Bluetooth to enhance the sound, or you can enjoy a comfortable audio-visual experience directly through the projector's speakers.

【HD Projection Display】Featuring 1280*720 native resolution, 10,000:1 High Dynamic Contrast Ratio, supports Full HD 4k, 1080P video, provides 25-110 inches projection screen with an optimal projection distance of 5.51 ft. 50% zoom function and low noise up to 25 dB ensures an impressive sound environment.

【Auto Keystone Correction】The mini projector uses manual focus and auto keystone correction technology with built-in high-precision sensors to detect real-time movement and focus faster and more accurately. Please use manual focus after the projector is started. Auto Keystone Correction automatically corrects the image up and down. To adjust the side projection, please use the remote control.

【Widely Used】 Portable projector with built-in HDMI, USB, and 3.5mm headphone port (please note that you need to buy HDMI cable by yourself) is suitable for TV Sticks/Box, Game Consoles, PCs, Smartphones, Tablets, Laptops, DVD Players, and USB Flash Drives, and so on. You can use it for home theatre, party, work and more.

title: 4K Portable Smart Projector with WiFi and Bluetooth [Compatible with Netflix & Dolby Audio], Mini Outdoor Movie Projector with Native 1080P, Auto Keystone & Electric Focus for Home Theater, Bedroom
bullet_points: [All-in-One Streaming Ready] This projector with wifi and bluetooth provides direct access to streaming platforms like Netflix, YouTube, and Prime Video. Simply connect to your home network and press play—no extra streaming devices needed. Designed for instant enjoyment, the mini projector eliminates compatibility issues and delivers seamless viewing. Perfect for home theater or outdoor movie nights, the smart projector works reliably out of the box and integrates effortlessly into your entertainment routine.

[Premium Home Theater Visuals] This 4k projector for bedroom features native 1080P resolution with 4K HDR support, delivering cinematic color accuracy and sharp detail. Advanced contrast technology produces deep blacks and bright whites for enhanced depth. Optimized for various lighting conditions, the ultra short throw projector 4k ensures stunning performance whether in dark rooms or under outdoor night skies. True-to-life imaging transforms your space into an immersive viewing environment, bringing every scene to life with theater-quality clarity.

[Cinema-Grade Dolby Audio Experience] This movie projector delivers immersive 20W stereo sound through its dual 10W Hi-Fi speakers with Dolby Audio technology, offering rich multidimensional audio, clear dialogue and powerful bass. Featuring HDMI ARC/CEC for easy external system connection and Bluetooth for wireless streaming, the tv projector also functions as a standalone speaker. Engineered to match its premium visuals, the home theater projector creates cinematic audio that fills any space with balanced, room-immersive sound.

[Compact Pro-Performance Design] Weighing just 1.52 pounds and sized 7.1*4.2*3.1 inches, this mini portable projector combines professional viewing with true portability. The smart mini projector for iphone projects a crisp 40-120 inch display from 3-11 feet, using a precise 1.24:1 throw ratio to maintain image quality even in compact spaces. Engineered for travel, camping, dorms, and outdoor screenings, the small projector's durable lightweight construction ensures big-screen entertainment is effortlessly accessible anywhere you go.

[Advanced Wireless & Audio Connectivity] Featuring next-generation WiFi 6 technology, this bluetooth projector for iphone ensures stable wireless performance for smooth screen mirroring and buffer-free streaming. The outdoor projector supports two-way Bluetooth 5.2 connectivity for seamless pairing with headphones, speakers, or mobile devices. Engineered for effortless digital integration, the tv projector with wifi and bluetooth enables convenient media sharing and multi-source playback, creating a harmonious entertainment ecosystem where all devices work seamlessly together.

[Auto Keystone & Focus Control] Featuring one-touch electric focus and automatic keystone correction, this phone projector for iphone instantly delivers perfectly rectangular, crystal-clear images. With 50%-100% zoom, you can adjust screen size without moving the unit. Designed for easy operation, room projector for bedroom supports flexible front, rear, or ceiling setups and maintains sharp, aligned images in any environment—from living rooms to outdoor spaces.

[Multi-Port & Mounting Versatility] This iphone projector offers HDMI (CEC/ARC), USB 2.0 ports, and audio outputs for wide device compatibility. Featuring an M6 mount, the video projector easily installs on tables, ceilings, walls, or tripods. Designed for versatile setups, the bedroom projector fits both indoor and outdoor spaces. The connectivity and mounting options provide tailored entertainment solutions for your needs.
